Обновление нарека 0.29
General Updates
Global Changes
Facets removed from the game
Innate abilities no longer scale with other abilities' level
All innate abilities that used to scale with other abilities now either provide unchangeable bonuses or improve on 'per level' basis
Abilities that improve with hero level have base value and increment value. Some also have amount of levels required for increment
Abilities that improve each level provide their increment value at level 1
Added UI icon that shows you which parameters increase with hero level and what is the current value
Pressing ALT key will show base value and increment of the ability
Some non-innate ability might have this per level UI as well
Abilities that had 'per level up' scaling changed to be 'per level'
This mostly affects heroes reworked in update 7.40 and Largo

Flagbearer Creep Experience Bounty increased from 57 to 60
First +1 siege creep timing decreased from 35:00 to 30:00
Second +1 siege creep timing now occurs at 60:00

Adjusted the meeting point of the lane creeps toward the offlane
Now offlane creeps are slightly slowed upon leaving the base for a couple of seconds
Safe lane creeps are slightly accelerated upon leaving the base for a couple of seconds
Both of these changes are effective until the 7:30 mark

All sections of currents now give a max movement speed bonus of 150
Previously was only provided by sections on the base and near it, while other sections provided max bonus of 100
Map Objectives

Tormentor
Tormentor's spawn preference has switched
Now begins in the Bottom Chasm
Unyielding Shield Base barrier increased from 2000 to 3000
Unyielding Shield Barrier upgrade per minute increased from 20 to 50
Unyielding Shield Base barrier regen decreased from 40 to 20
Unyielding Shield Barrier regen upgrade per minute increased from 3.5 to 5
Reflect Base damage reflection percentage decreased from 50% to 30%
Reflect radius can now be seen by holding ALT key
The Shining base damage decreased from 60 to 20
The Shining damage now increases by 2 per minute
Now has 25% Status Resistance
No longer deals damage to neutral units
Player that got Aghanim's Shard will no longer receive 175 gold
Total team gold reward decreased from 875 to 700 (total networth change decreased from 2275 to 2100).
Reward if all players have Aghanim's Shard decreased from 455 gold to 415 gold

Roshan's pit preference has switched
Now begins in the Top Pit
Wisdom Shrines and Lotus Pools now reverse their countdowns if heroes from opposing teams enter the area, instead of pausing the countdown
Wisdom Shrine Experience changed from 280 per interval to 200 base and 300 per subsequent shrine (200/500/800 etc)
Terrain Changes
Tormentor spawns have been positioned closer towards Lotus Pools
Tormentor spawn areas have been reduced to low ground relative to the lane's level
Lotus Pools have been moved slightly closer to their respective offlane tower
Twin Gates slightly moved away from the stairs towards the map border
The watcher between the safe lane tier 1 tower and the tormentor has been repositioned
Result:
Tormentor is on the low ground which has three stairs: one leading to the Lotus Pool, one leading to the lane, and one leading to even higher ground area with the Twin Gate
Twin Gate highground area is now smaller and has three stairs: one that leads to new Tormentor area, one that leads back to the lane, and one that goes two levels down straight to the end of the stream
Watcher is now between two stairs: one that goes down to the Tormentor and one that goes up to the Twin Gate

Ancient neutral camps near stream ends demoted to medium camps and moved slightly towards bases
Medium neutral camp near offlane defender's gate has been demoted to a small neutral camp

The tier 1 safe lane towers have been moved slightly away from their pull camps and where the creeps meet
Radiant safe lane small camp has been slightly moved north away from the lane
Radiant safe lane hard camp's spawn box has been moved towards the offlane to remove a bad ward location
Radiant offlane tier 2 tower has been adjusted slightly to the left, such that creeps do not path on both sides of the tower
The ramp leading from the Radiant tier 1 tower to the stream has been decreased in width and moved away from the tower
The medium flooded camp near the safe lane tier 2 towers moved closer to the middle of the stream (substantially more for Dire than for Radiant)
The medium flooded camp near the safe lane tier 2 towers can now only evolve once into a hard camp, rather than into an Ancient Camp
The medium flooded camp near the bounty runes can now evolve twice into an Ancient Camp
Removed several trees from Dire Safelane easy pull camp and Radiant Safelane hard pull camp
Mechanics Changes

Health Restoration
Health Restoration now applies to all forms of life gain
Previously, it did not apply to incoming heals
Incoming Heal Amplification now stacks diminishingly with Health Restoration instead of additively with Outgoing Heal Amplification
Spells that previously had a separate value for incoming heal reduction now only modify Health Restoration
* Eye of Skadi's Cold Attack
* Spirit Vessel's Soul Release
* Omniknight's Guardian Angel with Aghanim's Scepter
* Pudge's Rot with Aghanim's Scepter
As a result of the changes, spells that only modified Health Restoration will now additionally affect incoming heals
* Sange
* Kaya and Sange
* Sange and Yasha
* Abyssal Blade
* Orb of Frost's Frost
* Orb of Corrosion's Corrosion
* Crippling Crossbow's Hobble
* Jidi Pollen Bag's Pollinate
* Item bonus from Crude enchantment
* Abaddon’s Withering Mist
* Drow Ranger’s Frost Arrows with Aghanim’s Scepter
* Slark's Saltwater Shiv


Lifesteal and Damage Manipulations
Physical and Magical Lifesteal will now take into account overall damage reductions/amplifications when computing how much to lifesteal
This affects the following:

* Aeon Disk
* Bloodstone
* Consecrated Wraps
* Veil of Discord
* Prophet's Pendulum
* Audacious Enchantment
* Abaddon's Borrowed Time with Aghanim's Scepter
* Beastmaster's Wild Axes
* Bounty Hunter's Shadow Walk with talent
* Bristleback's Bristleback
* Centaur Warrunner's Stampede
* Grimstroke's Ink Trail
* Grimstroke's Soulbind with talent
* Hoodwink's Hunter's Boomerang
* Leshrac's Pulse Nova with talent
* Lich's Frost Shield
* Luna's Lunar Orbit
* Kunkka's Admiral's Rum
* Mars' Bulwark
* Nyx Assassin's Burrow
* Ogre Magi's Fire Shield
* Oracle's False Promise
* Pudge's Flesh Heap
* Shadow Demon's Menace
* Spectre's Dispersion
* Treant Protector's Living Armor
* Underlord's Invading Force
* Undying's Flesh Golem
* Ursa's Enrage
* Visage's Gravekeeper's Cloak
* Warlock's Golem with talent
Historically, Lifesteal was calculated before some damage reductions or amplifications were applied. As a result, you could gain health from attacks that dealt no damage (like attacks against a hero affected by Aeon Disk's Combo Breaker). This will not happen anymore
The only amplification that is not taken into account is increased damage against illusions


Miscellaneous
All sources of reflection damage now have an ALT-note detailing mechanics of reflected damage
The following items and abilities deal reflected damage:
* Tormentor's Reflect ability
* Blade Mail (both active and passive)
* Chipped Vest
* Rattlecage
* Axe's Counter Helix
* Bristleback's Quill Spray triggered by Bristleback passive
* Centaur Warrunner's Retaliate
* Nyx Assassin's Spiked Carapace
* Queen of Pain's Scream of Pain
* Razor's Storm Surge
* Shadow Demon's Disseminate
* Spectre's Dispersion
* Tidehunter's Anchor Smash triggered by Kraken Shell passive
* Viper's Corrosive Skin
* Warlock's Fatal Bonds
Reflected damage cannot be reflected back
Lifesteal and Spell Lifesteal don't apply to reflected damage
Reflected damage doesn't affect Debuff Immune units
Units with free movement now can miss their attacks when attacking uphill targets
Affected units:
* Batrider during Firefly
* Dragon Knight during Elder Dragon Form with Aghanim's Scepter
* Lina during Flame Cloak
* Terrorblade's Reflection illusions
Neutral Creep Updates
Kobold Foreman
Damage increased from 22–24 to 24–26
Kobold Soldier
Damage increased from 20–21 to 22–23
Kobold
Damage increased from 13–14 to 15–16
Vhoul Assassin
Damage decreased from 30–32 to 25–27
Ghost
Damage decreased from 45–50 to 38–43
Harpy Stormcrafter
Chain Lightning: Damage rescaled from 140/180/220/260 to 120/170/220/270
Satyr Tormenter
Shockwave: Damage rescaled from 160 to 140/160/180/200
Warpine Raider
Seed Shot: Damage rescaled from 100 to 80/95/110/125
Boglet
Arm of the Deep: After neutrals cast this ability, all copies of Arm of the Deep, Tendrils of the Deep, and Congregations of the Deep on other neutral Boglets, Croakers, and Ancient Croakers within 1200 range are put on 5s cooldown
Previously affected other copies of this ability
Croaker
Tendrils of the Deep: After neutrals cast this ability, all copies of Arm of the Deep, Tendrils of the Deep, and Congregations of the Deep on other neutral Boglets, Croakers, and Ancient Croakers within 1200 range are put on 5s cooldown
Previously affected other copies of this ability
Ancient Croaker
Congregations of the Deep: After neutrals cast this ability, all copies of Arm of the Deep, Tendrils of the Deep, and Congregations of the Deep on other neutral Boglets, Croakers, and Ancient Croakers within 1200 range are put on 5s cooldown
Previously affected other copies of this ability
Congregations of the Deep: Radius is now affected by Area of Effect bonuses
Ancient Marshmage
Water Bubble (Large): Radius is now affected by Area of Effect bonuses
Item Updates
Shop Reshuffle
Items in all shop categories except for Consumables have been rearranged to accommodate new items
Consumables now includes Infused Raindrops

Basic Items
Chasm Stone
New Miscellaneous Item
Costs 800 gold
Provides +40 Area of Effect
Area of Effect bonuses from multiple Chasm Stones or its upgrades do not stack
Shawl
New Miscellaneous Item
Costs 450 gold
Provides +10% Magic Resistance
Splintmail
New Equipment Item
Costs 950 gold
Provides +7 Armor
Wizard Hat
New Miscellaneous Item
Costs 250 gold
Provides +125 Mana

Chainmail
Cost decreased from 550g to 500g
Cloak
Cost increased from 800g to 900g
Magic Resistance bonus decreased from +20% to +18%
Cornucopia
Item removed from the game
Orb of Frost
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Refresher Shard
Reset Cooldowns no longer refreshes items
Ring of Health
Item moved back to Secret Shop from Miscellaneous Shop
Void Stone
Item moved back to Secret Shop from Miscellaneous Shop
Voodoo Mask
Spell Lifesteal bonus increased from +12% to +15%

Upgrades
Consecrated Wraps
New Armor Item
Requires Vitality Booster (1000), Shawl (450), Crown (450), and a recipe (700). Total cost: 2600g
Provides +15% Magic Resistance, +250 Health, and +6 All Attributes
Passive: Hallowed. Gain a stack every 3s, up to a maximum of 3 stacks. Whenever the wearer takes damage from a player-controlled unit or Roshan, all stacks are removed to create an all-damage barrier for 7s that absorbs 120 damage per removed stack (up to 360). If the wearer reached a max amount of stacks at least once in a game, regaining a stack provides a non-stacking buff that increases movespeed by 20% for 7s
Has no damage threshold, but doesn't proc from Health Loss damage (like Heartstopper Aura)
Can't gain stacks for 3s after taking damage from Roshan or player-controlled sources

Crella's Crozier
New Magical Item
Requires Ghost Scepter (1500), Soul Booster (3000), and a recipe (300). Total cost: 4800g
Provides +6 All Attributes, +450 Health, +450 Mana
Active: Rite of Rumusque. The wearer enters ghost form for 4 seconds, becoming immune to physical damage, but is unable to attack and 30% more vulnerable to magic damage. Steals 5% movement speed from enemy heroes in a 900 radius every second. Movement speed steal lasts 1.5s. Bonuses stack and have duration refreshed on gaining new stacks. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 20s
The ghost form and stolen speed can be dispelled off the wearer, but the stealing debuff that provides new stacks can't
Passive: Putrefaction Aura. Reduces health restoration of nearby enemy heroes by 30%. While Rite of Rumusque is active, the effect is increased to 75% and all of the lost Health Restoration is redirected to the wearer every second. Radius: 900

Essence Distiller
New Support Item
Requires Urn of Shadows (825), Chainmail (500), Wizard Hat (250), and a recipe (200). Total cost: 1775g
Provides +1.75 Mana Regen, +3 All Attributes, +6 Armor, and +150 Mana
Active: Soul Release. When cast on an ally, provides 40 health regeneration. If the ally is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan, the effect is lost. When cast on an enemy, deals 25 damage per second, provides True Sight over them and shares their vision with the wearer's team. Both effects last 8 seconds. Can be cast on the ground to put a dormant effect that will latch to the first enemy hero that comes within 400 range from it. The effect waits for 15s and provides 400 vision until it disappears. Gains charges every time an enemy hero dies within 1500 units. Cast Range: 1000. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 10s
Gains one charge if the wearer dies with an empty Essence Distiller
Gains two charges if Essence Distiller had no charges and an enemy hero dies within radius

Specialist's Array
Returning Armaments Item
Requires Blade of Alacrity (1000), Broadsword (1000), and a recipe (550). Total cost: 2550g
Provides +20 Damage and +12 Agility
Passive: Splitshot. Ranged Only. Ranged attacks have a 30% chance to fire additional projectiles at up to 2 nearby enemies that aren't the original attack target within 120 degree angle in front of the wearer and within attack range + 150. The additional projectiles deal 20 + 75% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects. The primary attack deals 20 + full damage of a normal attack when the ability procs
Doesn't work with other sources of secondary projectiles from hero abilities
Gyrocopter's Flak Cannon
Medusa's Split Shot
Muerta's Gunslinger

Hydra's Breath
New Armaments Item
Requires Specialist's Array (2550), Dragon Lance (1900), Orb of Venom (350) and a recipe (1100). Total cost: 5900g
Provides +25 Damage, +30 Agility, +15 Strength, and +150 Attack Range (Ranged Only)
Passive: Miasma. Attacks poison the target for 3 seconds, dealing magical damage equal to 2.5% of the target's max health every second. If the debuff is reapplied, the duration is refreshed. Can't be applied by illusions or to Roshan
Passive: Polycephaly. Ranged attacks have a 30% chance to fire at up to 3 nearby enemies that aren't the original attack target within 120 degree angle in front of the wearer and within attack range + 150. The additional projectiles deal 20 + 75% damage of a normal attack and do not trigger on hit effects except for Miasma. The primary attack deals 20 + full damage of a normal attack when the ability procs
Similarly to Specialist's Array, doesn't work with other sources of secondary projectiles from hero abilities

Arcane Boots
Recipe changed
Now also requires a Wizard Hat (250g)
Recipe cost decreased from 475 to 325. Total cost increased from 1400g to 1500g
Now also provides +125 Mana
Guardian Greaves
Recipe cost increased from 1125 to 1175. Total cost increased from 4300g to 4450g (due to Arcane Boots cost increase)
Now also provides +150 Mana
Mana Regen bonus decreased from +1.5 to +1
Battle Fury
Recipe changed
Now requires Perseverance (1400) instead of Cornucopia (1200)
Recipe cost decreased from 600 to 400. Total cost unchanged at 3900g
Black King Bar
Avatar duration changed from 9/8/7/6s to 9/8/7s
Blade Mail
Recipe changed
Now requires Splintmail (950) instead of Chainmail (550)
Recipe cost decreased from 750 to 450. Total cost increased from 2300g to 2400g
Armor bonus increased from +6 to +7
Crimson Guard
Armor bonus decreased from +8 to +6
Guard base damage block rescaled from 70 for all units to 70 on melee heroes and buildings and 45 on ranged heroes
Guard max health damage block decreased from 2.2% to 2%
Dagon
Recipe changed
Now requires Point Booster (1200), Wizard Hat (250) and Crown (450) instead of Diadem (1000) and Voodoo Mask (650)
Recipe cost unchanged at 1150. Total cost increased from 2800/3950/5100/6250/7400g to 3050/4200/5350/6500/7650g
No longer provides +15/16/17/18/19% Spell Lifesteal
All Attributes bonus decreased from +7/9/11/13/15 to +6/7/8/9/10
Now also provides +200/210/220/230/240 Health, +350/375/400/425/450 Mana, and +60/90/120/150/180 Cast Range
Cast Range Bonus does not stack with Aether Lens or multiple Dagons
Energy Burst cast range decreased from 700/750/800/850/900 to 640
Effective cast range with item's built-in Cast Range bonus decreased from 700/750/800/850/900 to 700/730/760/790/820
Energy Burst no longer instantly kills non-ancient creeps
Energy Burst no longer heals for 75% of damage dealt
Dragon Lance
Ranged Attack Range bonus decreased from +140 to +130
Hurricane Pike
Ranged Attack Range bonus decreased from +140 to +130
Hurricane Thrust cast range on enemies decreased from 450 to 425
Hurricane Thrust enemy push distance decreased from 450 to 425
Drum of Endurance
Recipe changed
Now requires Headdress (425) instead of Robe of the Magi (450)
Recipe cost increased from 500 to 525. Total cost unchanged at 1625g
No longer provides +7 Intelligence
Strength bonus increased from +7 to +8
Swiftness Aura now also provides +2.5 Health Regen
Endurance now shares cooldown with Boots of Bearing
Boots of Bearing
No longer provides +8 Intelligence
Swiftness Aura now also provides +2.5 Health Regen
Endurance now shares cooldown with Drum of Endurance
Eternal Shroud
Item removed from the game
Ethereal Blade
Can no longer be disassembled
Gleipnir
Recipe changed
Now also requires Chasm Stone (800)
Recipe cost decreased from 1100 to 400. Total cost increased from 4550g to 4650g
Area of Effect bonuses from multiple Chasm Stones or its upgrades do not stack
Glimmer Cape
Recipe changed
Now requires Shawl (450) instead of Cloak (800)
Recipe cost increased from 450 to 800. Total cost unchanged at 2150g
Hand of Midas
Transmute no longer prevents camp-clearing Madstone Bundles from spawning if it was used on the last creep in neutral camp
Getting guaranteed Madstone Bundle from Transmute used to prevent the camp-clearing bundle from spawning
Harpoon
Draw Forth can now target trees and will pull the caster to it, destroying all trees on the way
Heaven's Halberd
Recipe changed
Now requires Talisman of Evasion (1300), Splintmail (950), Ring of Health (700), and a recipe (450). Total cost: 3400g
Used to require Vanguard (1700), Crown (450) and a recipe (450). Total cost: 2600g
Can no longer be disassembled
No longer provides +275 Health
Now also provides +9 Armor and +25% Evasion
No longer has Damage Block passive
Disarm cooldown decreased from 20s to 16s
Disarm cast range increased from 650 to 750
Disarm duration increased from 3s to 3.5s
Kaya
Mana Regen Amplification bonus decreased from +40% to +30%
Kaya and Sange
Mana Regen Amplification bonus decreased from +50% to +40%
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Meteor Hammer
Mana Regen Amplification bonus decreased from +40% to +35%
Yasha and Kaya
Mana Regen Amplification bonus decreased from +50% to +40%
Lotus Orb
Can no longer be disassembled
Mage Slayer
Recipe changed
Now requires Perseverance (1400) instead of Cornucopia (1200)
Now requires Blades of Attack (450) instead of Gloves of Haste (450)
Total cost increased from 2800g to 3100g (change is bigger due to Cloak cost increase)
No longer provides +30 Attack Speed
Health Regen bonus increased from +5 to +6
Mana Regen bonus increased from +2 to +2.5
Damage bonus increased from +8 to +15
Mage Slayer damage type changed from magical to physical
Mage Slayer damage per second increased from 20 to 40
Mask of Madness
Berserk now also grants 30% Slow Resistance for the duration
Berserk bonus Movement Speed changed from +25 for all heroes to +8%/12% for Ranged/Melee
Berserk armor reduction decreased from 8 to 7
Mekansm
Recipe cost increased from 800 to 850. Total cost unchanged at 1775g (due to Chainmail cost decrease)
Monkey King Bar
Recipe cost increased from 600 to 900. Total cost increased from 4700g to 5000g
Now also provides +50 Attack Range to melee heroes only
Damage bonus increased from +40 to +50
Attack Speed bonus increased from +45 to +50
Nullifier
Recipe changed
Now requires Splintmail (950) instead of Helm of Iron Will (975)
Total cost decreased from 4375g to 4350g
No longer provides +6 Health Regen
Oblivion Staff
Mana Regen bonus increased from +1 to +1.25
Orchid Malevolence
Recipe changed
Now requires Claymore (1350) instead of Cornucopia (1200)
Recipe cost decreased from 450 to 300. Total cost unchanged at 3275g
No longer provides +6 Health Regen
Damage bonus increased from +10 to +20
Mana Regen bonus decreased from +3 to +2.5
Intelligence bonus increased from +10 to +12
Bloodthorn
Recipe changed
Now requires Oblivion Staff (1625) instead of Hyperstone (2000)
Recipe cost increased from 450 to 600. Total cost decreased from 6625g to 6400g
No longer provides +6.5 Health Regen
Intelligence bonus increased from +10 to +25
Attack Speed bonus decreased from +95 to +70
Mana Regen bonus increased from +3.25 to +4
Damage bonus increased from +10 to +20
Soul Rend Mana Cost increased from 125 to 150
Orb of Corrosion
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Eye of Skadi
Cold Attack no longer has a separate value for incoming heal reduction
Still reduces incoming heals due to Health Restoration changes
Cold Attack health restoration reduction increased from 40% to 50%
Pavise
Recipe changed
Now requires Wizard Hat (250) instead of Energy Booster (800)
Recipe cost increased from 175 to 675. Total cost decreased from 1400g to 1350g
Mana bonus decreased from +250 to +175
Solar Crest
Recipe changed
Now requires Chainmail (500) instead of Crown (450)
Recipe cost unchanged at 500. Total cost unchanged at 2575g (due to Pavise cost decrease)
No longer provides +4 All Attributes
Armor bonus increased from +4 to +7
Mana bonus decreased from +300 to +200
Health bonus increased from +175 to +200
Perseverance
Health Regen bonus decreased from +6.5 to +5.5
Phase Boots
Cost decreased from 1500g to 1450g (due to Chainmail cost decrease)
Phylactery
Health Regen bonus decreased from +6.5 to +5.5
Pipe of Insight
Recipe changed
Now requires Shawl (450) instead of Headdress (425)
Recipe Cost decreased from 800 to 675. Total cost unchanged at 3725g (due to Cloak cost increase)
Barrier no longer affects units that have been affected by Barrier within Pipe of Insight's cooldown
Insight Aura no longer provides 2.5 health regen
Radiance
Burn toggling no longer breaks invisibility nor stops channels
Refresher Orb
Health Regen bonus increased from +12 to +14
Mana Regen bonus increased from +6 to +7
Reset Cooldowns cooldown decreased from 180/190/200/210s to 180s
No longer scales with uses
Reset Cooldowns mana cost decreased from 400 to 325
Reset Cooldowns no longer refreshes items
Revenant's Brooch
Spell Lifesteal bonus increased from +14% to +15%
Sange
Slow Resistance bonus increased from +20% to +25%
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Abyssal Blade
Slow Resistance bonus increased from +25% to +30%
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Sange and Yasha
Status Resistance bonus increased from +15% to +16%
Slow Resistance bonus increased from +25% to +30%
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Shiva's Guard
Item Reworked
Recipe changed
Now requires Splintmail (950) and Chasm Stone (800) instead of Veil of Discord (1725)
Recipe cost decreased from 2050 to 1350. Total cost decreased from 5175g to 4500g
No longer provides +5 Strength, +5 Agility, +5 Intelligence, or +5 Health Regen
Armor bonus increased from +15 to +17
Now also provides +75 Area of Effect
Area of Effect bonuses from multiple Chasm Stones or its upgrades do not stack
Arctic Blast damage increased from 200 to 260
Arctic Blast radius decreased from 900 to 825
Effective spell radius unchanged due to item's built-in Area of Effect bonus
Arctic Blast no longer increases damage taken from spells
Freezing Aura no longer reduces Health Restoration and Incoming Heal Amplification by 25%
Freezing Aura now pierces debuff immunity
Spirit Vessel
Soul Release no longer has a separate value for incoming heal reduction
Still reduces incoming heals due to Health Restoration changes
Tranquil Boots
Break now also goes on cooldown when the item is disassembled. Reassembling the item will remember the time remaining
Veil of Discord
Recipe changed
Now requires Voodoo Mask (650), Robe of the Magi (450), Fluffy Hat (250), and a recipe (350). Total cost: 1700g
Used to require Ring of Health (700), Chainmail (550), Circlet (155), and a recipe (320). Total cost: 1725g
No longer provides +4 Armor, +4 All Attributes or +4.5 Health Regen
Now provides +10 Intelligence, +175 Health and +18% Spell Lifesteal
Magic Weakness renamed to Spell Weakness
Bloodstone
Item Reworked
Recipe changed
Now requires Veil of Discord (1700) instead of Void Stone (700) and Voodoo Mask (650). Total cost increased from 4350g to 4700g
No longer provides +3 Mana Regen
Spell Lifesteal bonus decreased from +25% to +20%
Health bonus increased from +450 to +650
Now also provides +15 Intelligence
Bloodpact no longer applies a basic dispel
Bloodpact no longer multiplies spell lifesteal bonus by 3. Now increases spell lifesteal to 60% instead
Spell Lifesteal during Bloodpact decreased from 75% to 60%
Bloodpact no longer has a 30s self debuff preventing repeated usage of Bloodpact
Now also provides passive Spell Weakness Aura
Enemy units within 1200 radius take 12% increased damage from spells
Effect does not stack with Veil of Discord's Spell Weakness
Witch Blade
Recipe cost increased from 250 to 300. Total cost unchanged at 2775g (due to Chainmail cost decrease)
Neutral Item Updates
General changes
Tier 1 availability changed from 5:00 to 0:00
Madstone crafting cost for Tier 1 items increased from 5 to 6
Artifact changes
Number of artifact choices increased from 4 to 5 for Tiers 2-5
Ash Legion Shield
Shield Wall damage barrier increased from 140 to 160
Shield Wall movement speed reduction increased from 12 to 20
Chipped Vest
Chipper damage returned to attacking creeps decreased from 20 to 15
Dagger of Ristul
Returning as a Tier 1 Neutral Artifact
Active: Imbrue. Increase attack damage by 25 for 8s. Health Cost: 100. Cooldown: 30s
Forager's Kit
New Tier 1 Artifact
When this item is off cooldown, the wearer can see trees that can be foraged. Standing next to one of those trees for 1s will give the wearer one of the following items. Cooldown: 60s. Tree reveal radius: 1200
All items except for bag of gold are placed in inventory (if there are slots available) and can stack up to 5 times per slot
Possible items:
Ironwood Nut: Passively provides +3 Movement Speed. Grants +1 Primary Stat when consumed (+.4 all stats for universal heroes)
Tomo'kan Ringcap: Passively Provides +2 Intelligence. Can be consumed to instantly grant a target 50 + 5% of their maximum mana
Vital Toadstool: Passively Provides +2 Damage. Can be consumed to grant a target +1% Max Health Regeneration for 10s. If the unit is attacked by an enemy hero or Roshan the bonus is lost
Bag of Gold: Provides 30 gold to the wearer. Don't need to be picked up
Possessed Mask
Returning as a Tier 1 Neutral Artifact
Passive: Lifesteal. Attacks heal for 5 health
This counts as lifesteal and is manipulated by Health Restoration
Stonefeather Satchel
New Tier 1 Artifact
Toggle: Transmogrify. Activate to switch the contents of the satchel between Feathers or Rocks. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 6s.
Pound of Feathers: Increases movement speed by 12 and distance of forced movement effects on yourself by 30%
Pound of Rocks: Increases armor by 3 and decreases distance of forced movement effects by 30%
Weighted Dice
Loaded now also increases max base damage by 6

Crippling Crossbow
Moved from Tier 4 to Tier 2
Hobble initial damage decreased from 75 to 25
Hobble Max slow decreased from 80% to 50%
Hobble Cast Range decreased from 800 to 650
Hobble now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Medallion of Courage
Returning as a Tier 2 Neutral Artifact
Active: Valor. If cast on an ally, increases their armor by 7 for 8s. If cast on an enemy, decreases their armor by 4 for 8s. Cannot be cast on self. Cast Range: 1000. Mana Cost: 30. Cooldown: 18s
Dormant Curio increases duration from 8s to 10.4s
Searing Signet
Burn Through: Total Damage decreased from 90 to 80
From 117 to 104 with Dormant Curio
Burn Through: Damage Threshold increased from 55 to 60
Seeds of Serenity
Returning as a Tier 2 Neutral Artifact
Active: Verdurous Dale. Place a 400 unit circle on the ground for 8s that increases health regeneration of allies inside by 8 + 25% of the caster's health regeneration. Cast Range: 350. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 35s
Dormant Curio increases health regeneration from 8 to 10.4 and from 25% to 32.5%

Whisper of the Dread
Item cycled out
Cloak of Flames
Returning as a Tier 3 Neutral Artifact
Passive: Immolate. Burns enemy units in a 375 unit radius for 40 damage per second. Illusions deal 25 damage per second
Dormant Curio increases damage from 40 to 52 and illusion damage from 25 to 32.5
Gunpowder Gauntlet
Beat the Crowd cooldown increased from 6s to 10s
Jidi Pollen Bag
Pollinate health restoration loss increased from 30% to 50%
Pollinate now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Partisan's Brand
New Tier 3 Artifact
Passive: Brand. Increases spell damage against player controlled units by 9%
Dormant Curio increases bonus spell damage from 9% to 11.7%
Player controlled units includes heroes and any creep summoned or converted by them
Serrated Shiv
Gut 'Em cooldown increased from 1s to 1.5s
Spellslinger
New Tier 3 Artifact
Passive: Salvo. Whenever you cast a spell, 20% of the spell's mana cost is restored over 10s. Tick rate: 2s
Dormant Curio increases mana restored from 20% to 26%
Mana recovery duration cannot be modified
Stormcrafter
Returning as a Tier 3 Neutral Artifact
Passive: Bottled Lightning. Every 6s, zaps up to 2 enemies within 700 units, slowing them by 40% for 0.4s and dealing 70 magic damage
Dormant Curio increases damage from 70 to 91

Conjurer's Catalyst
New Tier 4 Artifact
Passive: Spellover. Every 100 spell damage dealt to an enemy deals damage to their surrounding allies in a 300 unit radius. Hero targets deal 40 damage to their allies, other targets deal 15 damage
Dormant Curio increases hero damage from 40 to 52 and non-hero damage from 15 to 19.5
Dandelion Amulet
Returning as a Tier 4 Neutral Artifact
Passive: Magical Damage Block. Blocks 300 magic damage from instances over 75 damage. Cooldown: 12s
Dormant Curio increases blocked damage from 300 to 390
Enchanter's Bauble
New Tier 4 Artifact
Passive: Enchant. Increases bonuses of the item's Neutral Enchantment by 15%. Every time you craft this item again the bonus is increased by 40%
Dormant Curio increases recraft stat bonus from 40% to 52%
You can select any Enchantments during re-craft and bonus will still keep increasing as long as you keep Enchanter's Bauble
Metamorphic Mandible
Pupate duration increased from 4s to 5s
From 5.2s to 6.5s with Dormant Curio
Pupate bonus magic resistance increased from 35% to 50%
Prophet's Pendulum
New Tier 4 Artifact
Passive: Linger. 30% of damage taken is delayed over 5 seconds. Damage Ticks every 1 second and is lethal
Dormant Curio increases damage delayed from 30% to 39%
Rattlecage
Reverberate damage threshold increased from 180 to 220

Harmonizer
New Tier 5 Artifact
Passive: Balance. Grants 5% mana cost reduction for every hero ability off cooldown and 6% spell amplification for every spell on cooldown
Dormant Curio increases mana cost reduction from 5% to 6.5% and spell amplification from 6% to 7.8%
Item spells are affected by both effects, however item cooldowns don't affect the Harmonizer buff
The buff counts only current abilities that have cooldown, even if it's passive
Invoked abilities and sub-abilities don't count when they're hidden
Riftshadow Prism
Refract health cost decreased from 10% to 8%
Refract incoming damage decreased from 240% to 200%
Spider Legs
Skitter: Duration increased from 10s to 14s
Witchbane
Returning as a Tier 5 Neutral Artifact
Active: Cleanse. Apply basic dispel on all units in a 300 unit radius area. Cast Range: 500. Mana Cost: 150. Cooldown: 40s
Passive: Subjugate. Your attacks deal bonus magical damage equal to 4% of target's Max Mana
Dormant Curio increases damage from 4% to 5.2%
Enchantment Changes
Number of Enchantment choices increased from 4 to 5 for Tiers 2-5
Enchantments are no longer randomized
Now options are based on your hero's primary attribute, with some enchantments available to all heroes
Tier 1
All Heroes: Quickened, Vital
Strength: Brawny, Tough
Agility: Alert, Brawny
Intelligence: Mystical, Tough
Universal: Alert, Mystical
Tiers 2-3
All Heroes: Quickened, Greedy
Strength: Brawny, Tough, Crude
Agility: Alert, Brawny, Nimble
Intelligence: Mystical, Tough, Keen-Eyed
Universal: Alert, Mystical, Titanic
Tier 4
All Heroes: Quickened, Timeless
Attribute-exclusive Enchantments are the same as Tiers 2-3
Tier 5
All Heroes: Evolved, Fleetfooted, Timeless, Vampiric
Strength: Hulking
Agility: Audacious
Intelligence: Feverish
Universal: Manic
Boundless
Removed
Vast
Removed
Wise
Removed
Quickened
Now is a guaranteed Tiers 1-4 option for all heroes
Vital
New guaranteed Tier 1 option for all heroes
Provides +2 Health Regen
Brawny
Now is a guaranteed Tiers 1-4 option for Strength and Agility heroes
Tough
Now is a guaranteed Tiers 1-4 option for Strength and Intelligence heroes
Alert
Now is a guaranteed Tiers 1-4 option for Agility and Universal heroes
Attack Speed bonus decreased from +10/17/24/31 to +7/15/23/31
Mystical
Now is a guaranteed Tiers 1-4 option for Intelligence and Universal heroes
No longer provides +100 Cast Range bonus at Tier 4
Now provides +15% Mana Cost/Mana Loss Reduction at Tier 4

Greedy
Now is a guaranteed option for all heroes on Tiers 2-3
Crude
Now is a guaranteed option for Strength heroes only
Tiers changed from 4/5 to 2-4
Health Restoration bonus rescaled from +30/40% to +10/15/20%
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Base Attack Time Reduction bonus rescaled from 12/18% to 8/12/16%
Intelligence Penalty increased from 5% to 6%
Nimble
New guaranteed Tiers 2-4 option for Agility heroes only
Provides +6/8/10% Movement Speed, +10/15/20 Damage, and -1.5/2.25/3 Health Regen
Keen-eyed
Now is a guaranteed option for Intelligence heroes only
Tiers changed from 2/3 to 2-4
Cast Range bonus rescaled from +125/135 to +125/135/145
Mana Regen bonus rescaled from 1/1.5 to 1/1.5/2
Max Mana Penalty increased from 10% to 10/12/14%
Titanic
Now is a guaranteed option for Universal heroes only
Tiers changed from 4/5 to 2-4
Attack Damage bonus rescaled from +10/20% to +8/12/16%
Status Resistance rescaled from 10/15% to +10/12/14%
Now also provides -10/12/14% Attack Speed

Timeless
Now is a guaranteed Tiers 4-5 option for all heroes
Evolved
Now is a guaranteed Tier 5 option for all heroes
Fleetfooted
Now is a guaranteed Tier 5 option for all heroes
Vampiric
Now is a guaranteed option for all heroes
Tiers changed from 2-4 to 5
Lifesteal bonus increased from +12/14/16% to +30%
Spell Lifesteal increased from +6/8/10% to +20%
Bonus Night Vision increased from +0/0/200 to +300
Hulking
New guaranteed Tier 5 option for Strength heroes only
Provides +5% Max Health, +1.5% Max Health Regen, -30% Attack Speed
Audacious
Now is a guaranteed Tier 5 option for Agility heroes only
Feverish
Now is a guaranteed Tier 5 option for Intelligence heroes only
Manic
New guaranteed Tier 5 option for Universal heroes only
Provides -18% Base Attack Time, +20% Cast Speed, -20% Vision
Hero Updates
Abaddon
Abilities
Withering Mist
Health Restoration Reduction changed from 35% to 24.5% + 0.5% per level
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Mist Coil
Damage/Heal increased from 95/160/225/290 to 95/170/245/320
Borrowed Time
Cooldown decreased from 90/85/80s to 85/75/65s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +10% Withering Mist Health Restoration Reduction replaced with +25 Curse of Avernus DPS
Level 15 Talent +40 Curse of Avernus DPS replaced with -10s Borrowed Time Cooldown
Alchemist
Abilities
Greevil's Greed
Aghanim's Scepter now also increases Base Bonus Gold and Max Bonus Gold per kill by 6 per melted Aghanim's Scepter
Corrosive Weaponry
Movement Slow per stack increased from 2/2.5/3/3.5% to 2.5/3/3.5/4%
Base Attack Damage Reduction per stack increased from 2/2.5/3/3.5% to 2.5/3/3.5/4%
Talents
Level 10 Talent Unstable Concoction Radius increased from +125 to +150
Level 15 Talent Damage per Greevil's Greed stack increased from +2.5 to +3
Level 15 Talent Acid Spray grants armor to allies replaced with +1% Corrosive Weaponry Slow/Damage Reduction Per Stack
Ancient Apparition
Removed Death Rime innate ability
Abilities
Bone Chill
New innate ability. Passive, improves with Ancient Apparition's level
When Ancient Apparition deals magic damage with his abilities, affected enemies are chilled for 4s, reducing their movespeed by 2% per stack. If the target is an enemy hero, debuff also reduces their Strength by 0.1 + 0.1 per 3 levels. Each instance stacks and has independent duration
Upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases Base Strength Reduction by 0.3
Cold Feet
Now deals 20/40/60/80 damage per second
Ice Vortex
Now deals 10/20/30/40 damage per second
Now slows movement by 8%
Chilling Touch
Mana Cost decreased from 45/50/55/60 to 35
Aghanim's Scepter no longer reduces mana cost
Ice Blast
Now deals 12/24/36 damage per second
Talents
Level 10 Talent +2 Cold Feet Death Rime Stacks replaced with +30 Cold Feet Damage Per Second
Level 15 Talent Cold Feet Break Distance decreased from +300 to +250
Level 25 Talent +50% Death Rime Slow/Damage replaced with 450 AoE Cold Feet
Anti-Mage
Base Armor increased by 1
Abilities
Persecutor
No longer levels with Mana Void
Min Movement Slow rescaled from 12.5/15/17.5/20% to 12% + 0.5% per level
Max Movement Slow rescaled from 25/30/35/40% to 24% + 1% per level
Mana Break
Effectiveness when applied by illusions decreased from 50% to 25%
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases Max Mana Burned per hit by an additional 1.5%
Blink
Cast Range rescaled from 750/900/1050/1200 to 875/950/1025/1100
Cooldown decreased from 12/10/8/6s to 10.5/9/7.5/6s
Mana Cost increased from 50 to 65/60/55/50
Aghanim's Scepter no longer decreases cooldown by 1s
Counterspell
Magic Resistance decreased from 16/24/32/40% to 14/21/28/35%
Duration increased from 1.2s to 1.3s
Mana Void
Cooldown increased from 70s to 100/85/70s
Radius decreased from 500 to 400/450/500
Damage per 1 Mana Missing rescaled from 0.8/0.95/1.1 to 1
Talents
Level 15 Talent +1% Max Mana Mana Burn replaced with +0.2 Mana Void Damage Multiplier
Level 20 Talent +0.2 Mana Void Damage Multiplier replaced with +150 Blink Cast Range
Level 25 Talent +200 Blink Cast Range replaced with -1s Blink Cooldown
Arc Warden
Strength gain decreased from 2.4 to 2.2
Agility gain decreased from 3.0 to 2.7
Damage gain per level decreased from 3.6 to 3.4
Base Movement Speed increased from 285 to 300
Abilities
Runic Infusion
No longer grants the Regeneration Rune buff upon activating any rune
Now provides Arc Warden with +1.5 all attributes permanently whenever Arc Warden or the Tempest Double activates a Power Rune
Magnetic Field
The field now also pulls runes, and automatically activates ones that are inside. Rune Pull Force: 100. Rune Pull Radius: 800/1200/1600/2000
Spark Wraith
Slow Duration increased from 0.5/0.6/0.7/0.8s to 0.7/0.8/0.9/1s
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Tempest Double
Gold and XP Bounty rescaled from 180/240/300 to 70 + 10 per level
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
The Tempest Double is infused with the bonuses of Arcane, Invisibility, and Haste Runes for 12s. These bonuses don't provide Runic Infusion stacks
Talents
Level 20 Talent +50% Spark Wraith Damage replaced with +200 Spark Wraith Damage
Level 25 Talent -1.1s Spark Wraith Activation Delay replaced with +30s Spark Wraith Duration
Level 25 Talent Tempest Double Has No Penalties replaced with +1.5 Runic Infusion All Attributes Bonus (applies retroactively)
Axe
Removed Coat of Blood innate ability
Abilities
One Man Army
Now Axe's innate ability
Increases Axe's Strength by 50% of his armor, as long as there are no allied heroes within a 700 radius of him. The effect fades over 3s after an ally walks within range
Culling Blade
Now each hero kill made with Culling Blade provides a permanent stack, which provides 1/1.5/2 armor depending on the current level of Culling Blade
Bane
Strength gain decreased from 2.7 to 2.5
Agility gain decreased from 2.7 to 2.5
Intelligence gain decreased from 2.7 to 2.5
Damage gain per level decreased from 3.6 to 3.4
Attack Range increased from 400 to 425
Abilities
Ichor of Nyctasha
Ability reworked
Every time Bane kills an enemy hero or they die under the effect of any debuff applied by Bane, they receive a Terror for the rest of the game. Each Terror stack decreases the enemy's status resistance to all Bane's debuffs by 5%. Max Terror stacks per hero: 5
Nightmare
Now a Unit Vector Target Spell
Sleeping units walk in Bane's chosen direction at a speed of 110
Can be put on alt-cast to disable sleepwalking behavior
Batrider
Abilities
Firefly
Now also provides an increasing movement speed bonus that reaches its maximum of 12/18/24/30% at the end of Firefly's duration
Talents
Level 10 Talent +50 Flamebreak Knockback Distance replaced with +1s Smoldering Resin Duration
Level 10 Talent +50 Sticky Napalm Radius replaced with +5% Firefly Max Movement Speed Bonus
Level 15 Talent -8s Flaming Lasso Cooldown replaced with +0.5% Sticky Napalm Movement Slow
Level 15 Talent +20 Movement Speed replaced with +30 Firefly Damage Per Second
Level 20 Talent +4s Smoldering Resin Duration replaced with Attacks apply 1 Stack of Sticky Napalm
Level 25 Talent +10 Sticky Napalm Damage replaced with +0.75s Flaming Lasso Duration
Beastmaster
Removed Rugged innate ability
Abilities
Inner Beast
Now an innate ability
Bonus Attack Speed changed from 10/30/50/70 to 7 + 3 per level
Wild Axes
Damage per axe increased from 30/65/100/135 to 40/80/120/160
Damage Amp per stack decreased from 6/9/11/13% to 5/6/7/8%
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Beastmaster's attacks on enemy heroes also apply the Wild Axes debuff of its corresponding level
Illusions of Beastmaster don't apply Wild Axes stacks
Summon Razorback
Call of the Wild Boar renamed to Summon Razorback
Boar's armor increased by 1
Boar Attack Damage increased from 25/40/55/70 to 30/45/60/75
Summon Raptors
Call of the Wild Hawk renamed to Summon Raptors
Now is a separately leveled ability
Hawk's armor increased by 1
Cooldown decreased from 45/40/35/30s to 30s
Dive Damage increased from 50/80/110/140 to 60/95/130/165
Root Duration increased from 0.25/0.5/0.75/1s to 0.4/0.6/0.8/1s
Hawks are now invisible whenever Beastmaster is invisible or affected by Smoke of Deceit. They do not attack while invisible
Now summons 2 hawks by default with 0.75s delay between them
Hawks will now prioritize Beastmaster's current attack target when selecting their Dive target
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Talents
Level 10 Talent -5s Call of the Wild Cooldown replaced with +5 Armor
Level 15 Talent +15 Inner Beast Attack Speed replaced with +200 Primal Roar Cast Range
Bloodseeker
Abilities
Sanguivore
Max Health Heal changed from 1.5% + 1.5% per level up to 1.5% per level
Effective values are not changed
Bloodrage
Now a no target ability that affects only Bloodseeker
Pure damage based on target's max health with Aghanim's Shard now pierces Debuff Immunity
Talents
Level 25 Talent Blood Rite Silence Duration increased from +2.5s to +3s
Bounty Hunter
Abilities
Big Game Hunter
Ability reworked
Bounty Hunter receives 15% more kill and assist gold if the dying enemy hero is Big Game. An enemy hero is considered Big Game if they are one of the top 3 net worth heroes on the enemy team
Bounty Hunter has a list of heroes that are currently considered a big game, accessible by pressing special button over the innate
These heroes will also have a debuff, that points out that they're among these three heroes. Debuff is visible only to Bounty Hunter and his allies
Jinada
Gold Steal increased from 12/20/28/36 to 15/22/29/36
Shadow Walk
Now grants 8/12/16/20% bonus movement speed when active
Also applies to Friendly Shadow
Track
No longer grants 12/16/20% bonus movement speed to Bounty Hunter
Talents
Level 10 Talent Damage increased from +25 to +30
Brewmaster
Abilities
Liquid Courage
Max Status Resist changed from 10.5% + 0.5% per level up to 10% + 0.5% per level
Effective values are not changed
Primal Split
Earth Brewling's Hurl Boulder Stun Duration decreased from 1.6/1.6/1.6/2s to 1.6/1.6/1.6/1.8s
Storm Brewling's Cyclone Duration decreased from 3/4/5/6s to 3/3.75/4.5/5.25s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +1s Drunken Brawler Brewed Up / Extend Duration replaced with +2/1s Drunken Brawler Brewed Up / Extend Duration
Bristleback
Abilities
Prickly
Damage and debuff duration amplification changed from 10% to 4.5% + 0.5% per level
Viscous Nasal Goo
Stack Limit increased from 4 to 6
Now has the same duration on all units
Used to have double duration on creeps
Talents
Level 25 Talent +12% Spell Lifesteal replaced with -25 Bristleback Damage Threshold
Broodmother
Abilities
Spider's Milk
Hero Health as Heal changed from 2% to 1.9% + 0.1% per level
Insatiable Hunger
Now also applies lifesteal to Spiderlings within 800 range of Broodmother
Spin Web
Movespeed Bonus decreased from 10/22/34/46% to 10/20/30/40%
Talents
Level 15 Talent Spiderlings Health increased from +150 to +175
Level 15 Talent Incapacitating Bite Attack Bonus decreased from +6 to +5
Level 25 Talent -0.15s BAT during Insatiable Hunger now also affects Spiderlings within 800 range
Centaur Warrunner
Strength gain increased from 4.0 to 4.2
Removed Rawhide innate ability
Abilities
Horsepower
New innate ability
Centaur Warrunner gains 30% of his strength as bonus movement speed. This movement speed bonus does not stack with bonuses from boots
Chaos Knight
Removed Reins of Chaos innate ability
Abilities
Fundamental Forging
New reworked innate ability. Passive
When Chaos Knight crafts a neutral item, it gets an additional random enchantment that doesn't provide negative stats
The random enchantment is selected from all available enchantments in that tier, including ones that are normally not available for Strength heroes
Due to negative stats, Chaos Knight can't randomly get Crude, Nimble, Keen-Eyed, Titanic, Greedy, Hulking, Audacious, Feverish, and Manic Enchantments
The random enchantment is different from the one used in crafting
Reality Rift
Cooldown decreased from 18/14/10/6s to 15/12/9/6s
Chaos Strike
Critical Lifesteal increased from 24/36/48/60% to 30/40/50/60%
Phantasm
Aghanim's Scepter no longer guarantees to create an additional illusion on cast
Aghanim's Scepter now provides a passive component to this ability
Whenever an illusion of Chaos Knight is created, there is a 50% chance to create an additional illusion under Chaos Knight's control
Bonus illusion will be under Chaos Knight's control even if other illusions were made by an enemy
Chen
Removed Summon Convert innate ability
Abilities
Zealot
New innate ability, has both passive and active components. Improves with game's time
When Chen respawns, he is joined in battle by a Zealot, a melee creep warrior with the Martyrdom ability which allows him to sacrifice himself to deal damage or heal an ally. Zealot has the same stats as the current melee creeps on his team, including super or mega form, but has 125 attack range, base damage increased by 2 per Chen's level, base health regen increased from 0.5 to 2.5, and doesn't have Runty attack type. Zealot respawns after 60s dead
Martyrdom ability: 500 range unit-targeted ability on the Zealot creep, targeting either an enemy or ally unit. When cast, the creep sacrifices itself, firing a projectile at 1000 speed at the target unit, dealing damage if it's an enemy or healing if it's an ally. Damage is 25 + 20% of the Zealot's health at the moment of the cast, and healing is 50% of these values
This ability can be cast on a controlled unit to teleport it to Chen after a 6 second delay. Self-targeting will teleport all controlled units. Mana Cost: 50. Cooldown: 10s
Mechanics moved from Divine Favor without any changes
Holy Persuasion
Zealots receive the benefits from Holy Persuasion
Now may be cast on existing persuaded creeps that have not been damaged in the last 3 seconds to unsummon them
Unsummoning a unit has a global cast range, costs no mana and sets ability to a 3s cooldown
Now increases all of creature's outgoing damage by 0/6/12/18% instead of only increasing attack damage by 4/8/12/16
Divine Favor
Self-casting no longer teleports Chen's creeps to him
Still applies the Divine Favor buff to all of them
Talents
Level 10 Talent +150 Convert Attack Speed replaced with +25% Zealot Health/Damage
Level 15 Talent +14 Holy Persuasion Damage replaced with +12% Holy Persuasion Damage
Clinkz
Base Movement Speed decreased from 290 to 285
Abilities
Strafe
Skeleton attack speed multiplier decreased from 50% to 40%
Talents
Level 20 Talent Death Pact Health increased from +350 to +400
Clockwerk
Abilities
Armor Power
Now also allows Clockwerk to consume Chainmails to gain +4 armor per Chainmail consumed
Battery Assault
Mana Cost decreased from 90 to 75/80/85/90
Power Cogs
Clockwerk can now move freely through the cogs, sinking them down while walking over them. Other units can also walk over sunken Power Cogs
Mana Cost rescaled from 70 to 60/65/70/75
Mana Burn increased from 35/70/105/140 to 35/75/115/155
Overclocking
Duration increased from 13s to 18s
Now also increases Battery Assault radius to 330
Now also increases Power Cogs radius to 330 and provides 25% bonus armor to Clockwerk while he is near cogs
No longer increases Clockwerk's attack speed while inside Power Cogs
Now increases Rocket Flare damage, vision and slow duration by 35%
No longer decreases Rocket Flare cooldown to 3.5s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +0.4s Rocket Flare Slow Duration replaced with +1.5 Mana Regen
Level 15 Talent +2 Power Cogs Hits To Kill replaced with -10s Hookshot Cooldown
Level 25 Talent Debuff Immunity Inside Power Cogs replaced with 3 Rocket Flare Charges
Crystal Maiden
Removed Blueheart Floe innate ability
Abilities
Glacial Guard
New innate ability. Passive
A portion of the mana Crystal Maiden spends on her abilities is converted into a physical barrier for 8s. Barriers stack, but each instance has independent duration
Mana Spent to Barrier is 30% + 2% per level
Arcane Aura
Now also passively provides Crystal Maiden with 20/40/60/80% mana regen amplification
Talents
Level 20 Talent +225 Attack Speed replaced with +20% Glacial Guard Mana Spent To Barrier
Dark Seer
Abilities
Quick Wit
Aggrandize renamed to Quick Wit
Now also provides Dark Seer +1 attack speed from each point of Intelligence
Max Health and Mana Restore base value decreased from 10% to 8.5%
Talents
Level 15 Talent Ion Shell Provides +250 Max Health replaced with -1.5s Surge Cooldown
Dark Willow
Abilities
Pixie Dust
Ability reworked
Dark Willow's Health Regen and Mana Regen always have 20% Amplification, which increases to 100% whenever she becomes untargetable or invulnerable
Talents
Level 10 Talent Intelligence increased from +10 to +12
Level 15 Talent Terrorize Cooldown Reduction increased from 15s to 20s
Dawnbreaker
Base damage increased by 6
Damage at level 1 increased from 50–54 to 56–60
Abilities
Break of Dawn
Max Damage Increase changed from 25% to 10% + 1% per level
Bonuses granted are now at their maximum for any daytime caused by Dawnbreaker's abilities for the entirety of that daytime
Now also upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Amplifies heals Dawnbreaker provides by Break of Dawn's current damage increase value
Solar Guardian
Cooldown decreased from 120/105/90s to 110/100/90s
Now causes a 6 second temporary daytime when the cast starts
Aghanim's Scepter no longer increases heal per pulse
Talents
Level 10 Talent +15% Celestial Hammer Slow replaced with Celestial Hammer Trail Grants Movement Speed to Allies
Level 10 Talent +15% Break of Dawn Max Damage replaced with +25% Luminosity Critical Strike Damage
Level 15 Talent Solar Guardian Cooldown Reduction increased from 15s to 20s
Level 15 Talent +40% Luminosity Critical Strike Damage replaced with +40% Celestial Hammer Trail/Hammer Damage
Dazzle
Abilities
Weave
No longer levels with Nothl Projection
Armor Change per stack rescaled from 0.5/0.75/1/1.25 to 1
Duration changed from 8s to 6.9s + 0.1s per level
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Applying a stack of Weave on an ally heals them for 60 per stack of Weave, including the stack that was just applied
Nothl Projection
No longer does a hard dispel on Dazzle when projection ends
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Death Prophet
Base Armor increased by 1
Abilities
Witchcraft
Movement speed bonus changed from 0.75% + 0.75% per level up to 0.5% + 0.75% per level
Cooldown Reduction changed from 0.75% + 0.75% per level up to 0.75% per level
Effective values are not changed
Silence
Projectile speed increased from 1400 to 1750
Exorcism
Ghost spawn rate improved from 0.35s to 0.25s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +12% Magic Resistance replaced with +200 Health
Level 10 Talent +30 Attack Speed replaced with +75 Silence AoE
Level 15 Talent +100 Silence AoE replaced with +50 Attack Speed
Level 20 Talent +400 Health replaced with +6 Exorcism Spirits
Level 25 Talent +8 Exorcism Spirits replaced with Deaths During Exorcism Extend Duration by +8s (both allied and enemy heroes count)
Disruptor
Abilities
Electromagnetic Repulsion
Now deals damage equal to 1.5x of Disruptor's Intelligence
Thunder Strike
Strike Damage increased from 25/55/85/115 to 30/60/90/120
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Kinetic Fence
Now granted by Aghanim's Shard
No longer shares level with Kinetic Field. Has only one level instead
Cast Range increased from 1050 to 1200
Cooldown decreased from 20/18/16/14s to 14s
Duration increased from 2.6/3.2/3.8/4.4s to 4.4s
Can be increased with Kinetic Field Duration talent
Formation Delay increased from 0.4s to 1s
Talents
Level 15 Talent +10%/300 Glimpse Distance To Damage/Max increased to +15%/300
Level 20 Talent +150 Electromagnetic Repulsion Radius/Knockback replaced with +75 Static Storm Radius
Level 25 Talent +150 Static Storm Radius replaced with +6 Thunder Strike Strikes (also decreases Strike Interval by 50%)
As a result, increases overall duration from 6s to 9s
Level 25 Talent -12s Glimpse Cooldown replaced with 2 Glimpse Charges
Doom
Abilities
Lvl ? Pain
Ability slightly reworked
When Doom attacks enemy heroes, he applies a curse upon them. After 2.5s, the cursed hero bursts with a pillar of fire, damaging itself and all enemy units in a 66 AoE for 15% of the damage taken from Doom (the hero) over this duration, including damage from the attack that applied the curse. If the cursed hero's level is a multiple of 6, the curse damage and radius will be increased by 66%
Devour
Now the default cast gained on learning Devour is the one that grants abilities of devoured creeps, and alt-cast state keeps the ones that Doom currently has
Cooldown decreased from 70s to 66s
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Replaces cooldown with 2 charges with 66s restore time. Allows to devour Ancient Neutral Creeps. Gained spells also have 20% bonus AoE and 40% Spell Amplification
Scorched Earth
Radius increased from 600 to 666
Now also provides Doom with 7/8/9/10 bonus health regen
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Infernal Blade
Stun Duration increased from 0.6s to 0.66s
Doom
Damage per second increased from 25/45/65 to 25/45/66
Aghanim's Scepter now also applies Break to affected enemies
Aghanim's Scepter no longer increases damage per second by 15
Talents
Level 15 Talent Devour Can Target Ancients replaced with +66 Damage
Level 15 Talent Scorched Earth Movement Speed increased from +5% to +7%
Level 20 Talent -10s Scorched Earth Cooldown replaced with -10s Doom Cooldown
Level 25 Talent Doom applies Break replaced with Permanent Scorched Earth (ability becomes toggleable with no mana cost and a 2.5s cooldown between toggles)
Dragon Knight
Strength gain decreased from 3.6 to 3.2
Base Movement Speed decreased from 315 to 310
Abilities
Breathe Fire
Damage Reduction rescaled from 30% to 20/24/28/32%
Cast range increased from 600 to 1000
Fixed the cast indicator not matching the actual damage range of the ability, and also to properly reflect cast range bonuses
Dragon Tail
No longer has an Elder Dragon specific cast range
Now has 25 radius AoE by default
Wyrm's Wrath
Now always grants the 10/20/30/40 bonus magic damage on attack, and 25/50/75/100 Area of Effect bonus
Elder Dragon Form
Now evolves per level. The bonuses are cumulative
Level 1: Green Dragon: Attacks apply a Corrosive poison that deals 25 magical damage per second for 3 seconds. Affects buildings
Level 2: Red Dragon: Attacks have splash damage that deals 75% of attack damage to all enemies within 275 AoE range
Applies Corrosive poison to all affected units. Other attack modifiers will affect only the primary target
Level 3: Blue Dragon: Attacks also apply a Frost debuff, which pierces Debuff Immunity and slows attack by 50 and movement by 30%
Splash attacks apply Corrosive poison and Frost slow to all affected units. Other attack modifiers will affect only the primary target
Bonus Move Speed increased from 20 to 25/30/35
No longer provides bonus attack damage
Now also increases cast range of all abilities by 350
Doesn't affect items
Aghanim's Scepter no longer improves Wyrm's Wrath effectiveness while in Dragon Form
Aghanim's Scepter Black Dragon stats slightly rescaled
Level 4 Black Dragon has the following stats: 40 Bonus Move Speed, 35 Corrosive Damage, 100% Splash Damage, 350 Splash Radius, 65 Attack Slow, 45% Movement Slow, and also provides +20% Magic Resistance and free pathing
Fireball
No longer has an Elder Dragon specific cast range
Damage per second increased from 75 to 85
Duration decreased from 8s to 6s
Talents
Level 20 Talent +60% Breathe Fire Damage/Cast Range replaced with +200 Breathe Fire Damage
Level 25 Talent +50% Wyrm's Wrath effect during Elder Dragon Form replaced with +50% Wyrm's Wrath Bonuses
Drow Ranger
Base Damage decreased by 2
Damage at level 1 decreased from 51–58 to 49–56
Abilities
Precision Aura
No longer levels with Marksmanship
Agility Base Bonus rescaled from 4/8/12/16% to 10%
Frost Arrows
Now also modifies incoming healing with Aghanim's Scepter
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Gust
Knockback duration now scales inversely with distance from the target, similar to knockback distance. Minimum knockback duration is 0.4 seconds
Multishot
Now allows Drow Ranger to move with a 35% penalty and use items while casting Multishot
Glacier
No longer increases the number of Multishot arrows
No longer grants True Strike on the hill
Now Drow Ranger deals 25% more damage when attacking from high ground while on the Glacier
Earth Spirit
Abilities
Stone Remnant
Max Charges changed from 7 + 1 per 4 level ups to 7 + 1 per 4 levels
This means bonus charges are gained 1 level earlier (on levels 4/8/12... instead of 5/9/13...)
Boulder Smash
Slow Duration increased from 1.25/2.5/3.25/4s to 1.75/2.5/3.25/4s
Geomagnetic Grip
Silence Duration increased from 2/2.5/3/3.5s to 2.3/2.7/3.1/3.5s
Magnetize
Damage per second increased from 45/85/125 to 45/90/135
Talents
Level 25 Talent Geomagnetic Grip Remnant Damage increased from +175 to +250
Earthshaker
Abilities
Slugger
No longer levels with Echo Slam
Damage (Creep Death) changed from 30/45/60/75 to 27 + 3 per level
Damage (Hero Death) changed from 150/250/350/450 to 135 + 15 per level
Fissure
Stun Duration increased from 0.8/1.0/1.2/1.4s to 1.0/1.2/1.4/1.6s
Aftershock
Radius increased from 300 to 350
Echo Slam
Shockwave projectile speed increased from 550 to 650
Elder Titan
Removed Tip The Scales innate ability
Abilities
Momentum
New innate ability. Passive, can't be leveled up
Elder Titan's armor increases by 3.6% + 0.4% per level of his bonus movement speed
Only counts movement speed that he has above his base (305) value
This ability can't reduce Elder Titan's armor when he is slowed below the base movement speed value
Astral Spirit
No longer provides armor on return
Still grants movement speed, which is then used by the innate ability to provide armor
Earth Splitter
Cooldown decreased from 100s to 100/95/90s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +25 Attack Speed replaced with +150 Echo Stomp Wake Damage
Level 15 Talent +25 Astral Spirit Hero Attack replaced with 20% of Bonus Movement Speed as Attack Speed
Level 20 Talent +350 Echo Stomp Wake Damage replaced with +30 Astral Spirit Bonus Damage per Hero
Ember Spirit
Strength gain increased from 2.3 to 2.5
Abilities
Immolation
No longer levels with Fire Remnant
Damage per second changed from 10/18/26/34 to 10 + 1 per level
Radius increased from 175 to 200
Aghanim's Shard bonus radius decreased from 175 to 150
Total Shard radius unchanged with base radius increase
Searing Chains
Mana Cost decreased from 95/105/115/125 to 80/90/100/110
Sleight of Fist
Bonus Hero Damage increased from 25/70/115/160 to 50/90/130/170
Enchantress
Abilities
Rabble-Rouser
Damage Increase changed from 4% + 4% per level up to 4% per level
Effective values are not changed
Enchant
Cast Range increased from 500/550/600/650 to 500/600/700/800
Now enchanting enemy heroes increases attack range against them by 50/100/150/200 for Enchantress and units under her control
Nature's Attendants
Added a tooltip to display the total max possible heal
Talents
Level 25 Talent Untouchable Attack Slow increased from +70 to +80
Enigma
Removed Gravity Well innate ability
Abilities
Event Horizon
New innate ability. Passive, improves with Enigma's level
Units in a 600 radius moving away from Enigma have a movespeed penalty equal to 4% + 1% per level
Talents
Level 15 Talent +60 Malefice Instance Damage replaced with +100 Event Horizon Radius
Faceless Void
Abilities
Distortion Field
No longer levels with Chronosphere
Now only applies to projectiles targeting Faceless Void or an allied hero within a 1200 radius of him
Max slow distance rescaled from 600 around Faceless Void to 500 around the targeted hero
Enemy attack projectile speed slow rescaled from 35/40/45/50% to 40%
Time Walk
Aghanim's Scepter now also provides Reverse Time Walk sub-ability
Aghanim's Scepter Time Lock attacks will no longer miss if Reverse Time Walk is used too quickly after Time Walk
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Time Dilation
Duration no longer counts down while under effect of Chronosphere
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Increases Attack/Movement Slow per cooldown by 5/5%. Provides Faceless Void with bonus movement and attack speed by the same values per each enemy cooldown extended. The bonus degrades over the duration of the buff
9/10/11/12 Attack Speed + the same value per affected cooldown, 9/10/11/12% Movement Speed + the same value per affected cooldown
This buff also doesn't count down under effect of Chronosphere
Chronosphere
Now the default ultimate ability
Talents
Level 15 Talent +8% Time Dilation Slow per Cooldown replaced with +125 Time Walk Range
Grimstroke
Abilities
Ink Trail
Now also applied when an enemy hero is affected by any of Grimstroke's abilities
Now also applied by attacks from Grimstroke's illusions (including Dark Portrait)
Grimstroke now takes 5% + 0.5% per level less damage from enemies affected by Ink Trail
Stroke of Fate
Can now be put on alt-cast to send the stroke straight
Gyrocopter
Base Movement Speed decreased from 320 to 315
Removed Chop Shop innate ability
Abilities
Afterburner
New innate ability
Whenever Gyrocopter damages an enemy with attacks or abilities, he gains + 1 movement speed per hero and + 0.5 per creep. Duration is 3.9s + 0.1s per level. Effects stack independently
Flak Cannon
Aghanim's Scepter upgrade moved into a separate ability
Side Gunner
New ability granted by Aghanim's Scepter, effect is unchanged
Hoodwink
Abilities
Mistwoods Wayfarer
No longer levels with Sharpshooter
Redirect Chance changed from 14/21/28/35% to 14% + 1% per level
Acorn Shot
Cast Range rescaled from (Hoodwink's attack range + 100) to 675/700/725/750
As a result, Cast Range increased from 675 to 675/700/725/750
Bushwhack
Cast Range increased from 1000 to 1100
Scurry
No longer doubles all sources of evasion for the duration
Now doubles redirect chance of Mistwoods Wayfarer for the duration
Sharpshooter
Now treats creep heroes as creeps
The projectile flies through creeps, dealing them damage for half value, but still applying Slow and Break at full force and duration
Since Spirit Bear is considered a true hero, the projectile will stop on impact with it
Talents
Level 10 Talent Health increased from +150 to +175
Level 15 Talent +1 Acorn Shot Bounce replaced with +10 Agility
Level 20 Talent -3 Armor Corruption replaced with +2 Acorn Shot Bounces
Huskar
Intelligence gain decreased from 1.5 to 0
Base Movement Speed decreased from 295 to 290
Abilities
Inner Fire
Damage increased from 105/170/235/300 to 110/180/250/320
Knockback Duration now scales based on Knockback Distance to a minimum of 0.4s
Enemies which are 375 units or farther now receive a flat knockback of 25 units
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Burning Spear
Health Cost changed from 4% of current health to 2% of max health
Huskar can use this ability even if he has less health than the health cost requires
Now also burns enemies for 0.5% of their max health
Berserker's Blood
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Can be activated for a health cost. Applies basic dispel to Huskar, then after a delay, heals for the amount of health consumed plus an additional bonus per debuff dispelled. Current HP Cost: 30%. Cooldown: 20s. Cauterize Delay: 3s. Max HP Heal per debuff: 3%
Invoker
Abilities
Quas
Max Level increased from 7 to 8
Wex
Max Level increased from 7 to 8
Exort
Max Level increased from 7 to 8
Tornado
Aghanim's Scepter twister damage decreased from 40 + 10 * Wex Level to 30 + 10 * Wex Level
60/70/80/90/100/110/120/130/140/150 to 50/60/70/80/90/100/110/120/130/140
Invoke
Now whenever Invoker gets Aghanim's Scepter or Aghanim's Shard, these items are inert in the inventory until Invoker activates them manually. Upon activation, he will be presented with three upgrades to choose from. Upgrades themselves for both Aghanim's Scepter and Aghanim's Shard are unchanged
You can't change selected upgrades. Selling Aghanim's Scepter and buying it again will provide the same upgrade you chose the first time
Aghanim's Scepter no longer provides +1 level to all three orbs. Now it provides +1 level only to a single orb you choose
Talents
Level 15 Talent +1 Facet Orb Level replaced with +25 Alacrity Speed/Damage
Level 20 Talent +50 Alacrity Speed/Damage replaced with +1 Orb Levels
Io
Removed Wellspring innate ability
Abilities
Equilibrium
New innate ability
Io always has bonus Outgoing Damage Amp which linearly scales with its health, reaching a maximum of 5% + 0.5% per level at 100% Health. At the same time, Io has Health Restoration and Healing Amplifications which also linearly scale with its health, but reach a maximum of 5% + 0.5% per level at zero Health
Overcharge
Now also provides 35/60/85/110 Attack Speed and 8/10/12/14% Spell Amplification to Io and any tethered Allies
Talents
Level 10 Talent Strength increased from +7 to +8
Level 25 Talent Relocate Cast Delay Reduction increased from 1.5s to 2s
Jakiro
Abilities
Double Trouble
Attack Damage Reduction changed from 50% to 51% - 1% per level
Liquid Fire
Now has a 20 mana cost
Aghanim's Shard now also reduces mana cost to 0
Liquid Frost
Now has a 20 mana cost
Aghanim's Shard now also reduces mana cost to 0
Talents
Level 10 Talent Ice Path Damage increased +60 to +75
Level 15 Talent Dual Breath Cooldown Reduction increased from 3s to 3.5s
Juggernaut
Removed Duelist innate ability
Abilities
Bladeform
New innate ability
Juggernaut receives a stack of Bladeform every 2s that he does not take damage. Each stack grants 2.5% + 0.05% per level base Agility bonus and 1% movement bonus and there is a maximum of 10 stacks. Stacks fade after 2s upon taking any damage
Blade Fury
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Healing Ward
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Increases healing by 1.5% and hits to destroy by 1
Talents
Level 10 Talent +4% Duelist Damage replaced with -1s Bladeform Stack Gain Interval
Level 15 Talent +1% Healing Ward Heal replaced with -15s Omnislash Cooldown
Level 15 Talent Movement Speed During Blade Fury increased from +40 to +45
Level 20 Talent Blade Fury DPS increased from +90 to +100
Level 20 Talent +1 Healing Ward Hits to Destroy replaced with +15% Blade Dance Crit Damage
Keeper of the Light
Base Movement Speed decreased from 320 to 315
Removed Special Reserve innate ability
Abilities
Bright Speed
New innate ability. Passive, can't be leveled up
Keeper of the Light gains +1 movement speed for every 2.5 Intelligence. Whenever Keeper of the Light moves 300 distance, he leaves behind light that allows him to see in 400 range for 3 seconds
Chakra Magic
Cooldown rescaled from 18/16/14/12s to 19/16/13/10s
Mana Restore increased from 90/160/230/300 to 105/170/235/300
Blinding Light
Cast Range increased from 400/500/600/700 to 500/575/650/725
Knockback distance changed from 400 to knocking back to the edges of the effect radius, but a minimum knockback distance is 175
Min distance is used for enemies near the edge of AoE
Spirit Form
No longer grants bonus movement speed percentage
Now increases movement speed bonus of Bright Speed by 50% while active
Talents
Level 15 Talent -5s Blinding Light Cooldown replaced with +90 Blinding Light Damage
Level 15 Talent -2s Chakra Magic Cooldown replaced with +30% Spirit Form Bright Speed Bonus
Level 20 Talent +200 Chakra Magic Mana replaced with +10% Solar Bind Magic Resistance Reduction
Level 20 Talent +10% Spirit Form Movement Speed Bonus replaced with +15s Spirit Form Duration
Kez
Base Movement Speed decreased from 315 to 310
Base Attack Speed decreased from 110 to 100
Abilities
Switch Discipline
Cooldown changed from 7.75s - 0.25s per level up to 8s - 0.25s per level
Effective values are not changed
Now the first katana hit or ability will deal 12% bonus damage after switching to Katana, and after switching to Sai Kez gains +12% movement speed for 2 seconds
Aghanim's Scepter no longer restarts the alternate ability cooldown if it was already on cooldown
Grappling Claw
When targeting a tree, now always destroys the targeted tree and ends in the tree's position
Talon Toss
Cast Range decreased from 1200 to 650/750/850/950
Now matches Grappling Claw
Shodo Sai
The proc effect now triggers a critical strike only instead of creating a Mark
18% Chance to Mark replaced with 20% Critical Strike Chance
As a result, marks are applied only by parrying and casting Raven's Veil
No longer restricts Kez from proccing passive Bash spells of Skull Basher and Abyssal Blade
Mark Stun Duration increased from 0.4s to 0.5/0.6/0.7/0.8s
No longer has a parry bonus by default
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Parrying creates a stronger mark that will stun the target for an additional 0.2s and an a crit bonus of 50%
Raptor Dance
No longer provides magic damage immunity
Talents
Level 25 Talent +100% Shodo Sai Mark Critical Strike replaced with +80% Shodo Sai Critical Strike
Kunkka
Abilities
Admiral's Rum
Can no longer be applied by multiple sources, and will no longer trigger passively if Ghostship already applied the buff
Cooldown changed from 60s to 60.5s - 0.5s per level
Bonus Movement Speed rescaled from 10% to 7.75% + 0.25% per level
Duration decreased from 6s to 5s
Delayed Damage decreased from 20% to 18%
Ghostship
Now applies Admiral's Rum at a 2x factor
Multiplication applies to duration, delayed damage and movement speed bonus
Talents
Level 10 Talent -15s Admiral's Rum Cooldown replaced with +1s Admiral's Rum Buff Duration
Level 15 Talent Tidebringer Damage increased from +70 to +75
Level 20 Talent +15% Admiral's Rum Damage Delayed replaced with +80% Tidebringer Cleave
Level 25 Talent +130% Tidebringer Cleave replaced with Tidebringer Ignores 25% Armor
Largo
Abilities
Encore
Bonus Duration changed from 10% + 1% per level up to 9% + 1% per level
Effective values are not changed
Catchy Lick
Now can lick runes to pull them. Rune-licking refunds spent mana
Health Regen Duration decreased from 10s to 8s
Bonus health regen is now also provided if the target is killed by Catchy Lick
Amphibian Rhapsody
Aghanim's Scepter no longer adds damage to double-strumming
Bullbelly Blitz
Now also deals 20/30/40 magical damage by default
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases magic damage by 6/12/18 per Groovin' stack when this song is used in double-strumming
Hotfeet Hustle
Move Speed decreased from 16/22/28% to 16/20/24%
Slow Resistance decreased from 70/80/90% to 70/75/80%
Talents
Level 15 Talent Croak of Genius Max Health DPS decreased from 1.5% to 1%
Level 25 Talent Amphibian Rhapsody Song Effects decreased from +35% to +30%
Legion Commander
Base armor decreased by 1
Abilities
Outfight Them!
Ability reworked
Passively grants Legion Commander bonus armor, equal to 1 + 0.1 per level. Whenever Legion Commander casts an ability, she gains the same amount as a stacking bonus for 6s. Whenever allies within 1200 range cast an ability, they also gain a 6s buff with 50% of the value. This bonus stacks independently
Overwhelming Odds
Now also applies 100% movement slow upon dealing damage for 0.3s
Aghanim's Shard upgrade reworked
Increases radius by 100. Grants an all damage barrier equal to 50% of the damage dealt with Overwhelming Odds for 6s
Press The Attack
Multiple instances can now stack independently
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases bonus movement speed by 12%. Ability becomes cast-point, affecting all allies within the targeted 500 radius area. Legion Commander is always affected, even when outside of the cast area
Moment of Courage
No longer has a 25% proc chance
Now automatically triggers after taking 7/6/5/4 attacks
Will not activate unless Legion Commander is both attacking and being attacked. Until this requirement is met, the 'prepared' state is kept indefinitely
Cooldown decreased from 1.7/1.4/1.1/0.8 to 0.3s
Duel
Legion Commander can now use any abilities during Duel
Legion Commander will stop attacking as normal during cast animations
Items can't be used
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Aghanim's Scepter upgrade reworked
When Legion Commander wins a duel, Press the Attack is automatically triggered around her
Talents
Level 10 Talent +12% Press the Attack Movement Speed replaced with +1 Outfight Them! Armor
Level 20 Talent +8% Moment of Courage Proc Chance replaced with -1 Moment of Courage Attacks To Trigger
Level 20 Talent 300 AoE Press The Attack replaced with +1s Duel Duration
Level 25 Talent Press the Attack grants 1.5s Debuff Immunity replaced with Duel Refreshes Cooldown on Victory
Leshrac
Abilities
Diabolic Edict
Duration improved from 10s to 8s
Number of explosions (hence, total damage) is unchanged, explosion interval decreased from 0.25s to 0.225s
Lich
Base Mana Regen decreased from 0.75 to -1
Intelligence gain decreased from 3.8 to 3.4
Removed Death Charge innate ability
Abilities
Sacrifice
New Innate ability. Active
Lich can instantly kill an allied creep to gain mana relative to its current health and earn experience bounty for it. Health to Mana: 42% + 3% per level. Experience Bounty: 69% + 6% per level. Cast Range: 700. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 120s
This ability starts on extended cooldown and with no charges, making the first cast possible only at 2:00 mark
Sacrificed creeps count as denies, providing experience to enemy heroes. Lich's experience gain is independent from experience enemies gain
Talents
Level 20 Talent +4s Frost Shield Duration replaced with 2 Frost Shield Charges
Level 25 Talent +100 Chain Frost Incremental Damage replaced with Chain Frost Unlimited Bounces
Lifestealer
Base Damage increased by 10
Damage at level 1 increased from 39–45 to 49–55
Base Attack Speed increased from 100 to 120
Base Movement Speed increased from 315 to 320
Abilities
Ghoul Frenzy
Reworked into Innate ability. Passive
Provides Lifestealer with 5 bonus Attack Speed per level
Rage
Now also provides 9/12/15/18% bonus movement speed while active
Open Wounds
Mana Cost decreased from 100 to 90
Max Slow increased from 35/40/45/50% to 50%
Feast
Now is a basic ability
Heal From Target's Max Health rescaled from 2/2.25/2.5/2.75% to 1.45/2.05/2.65/3.25%
Max Health Damage rescaled from 2/2.25/2.5/2.75% to 1.45/2.05/2.65/3.25%
Max Health per Hero Kill increased from 10 to 10/15/20/25
Is not retroactive
No longer increases deny health threshold to 75%
Infest
Now can be used on Ancient creeps by default
Aghanim's Shard upgrade reworked
When consuming a creep, enemies also take damage over time equal to 30% of the creep's remaining health. Damage duration: 3s. Has no effect when bursting out of enemy heroes
Talents
Level 10 Talent +3% Ghoul Frenzy Movement Speed replaced with +20 Movement Speed
Level 15 Talent +15% Open Wounds Slow replaced with 50 Attack Speed on Open Wounds Target
Level 15 Talent +50 Ghoul Frenzy Attack Speed replaced with +175 Infest Damage
Level 20 Talent Infest Target Movespeed/Health decreased from +15% to +12%
Lina
Removed Combustion innate ability
Abilities
Slow Burn
New innate ability
Lina's abilities deal an additional 64% damage as undispellable burn damage over 4s
Dragon Slave
Damage decreased from 85/165/245/325 to 65/125/185/245
Light Strike Array
Damage decreased from 110/160/210/260 to 80/120/160/200
Laguna Blade
Damage decreased from 500/750/1000 to 380/565/750
Aghanim's Shard upgrade reworked
Casting Laguna Blade temporarily supercharges Lina, granting her 12 stacks of Fiery Soul. Supercharge duration: 5s
Talents
Level 15 Talent Light Strike Array Damage decreased from +150 to +110
Level 25 Talent +150% Crit On Targets Affected By Spells replaced with 150% Attack Crit on Targets Affected by Slow Burn
Level 25 Talent +60% Combustion Overheat Damage replaced with +1s Slow Burn Duration
This increases additional damage from 64% to 80%
Lion
Abilities
To Hell and Back
Ability reworked
Killing or assisting in a Hero kill provides Lion with 20% debuff duration while that hero is dead. Whenever Lion respawns or resurrects, he gains 20% spell amplification for 90s or until he gets a kill or an assist
Finger of Death
Cooldown decreased from 120/80/40s to 110/70/30s
Damage per kill decreased from 40 to 30
Now has empowered melee attacks after the cast by default
After using Finger of Death, Lion's hand becomes empowered, turning him into a melee hero with 250 attack range and 30 bonus movement speed. These melee attacks have 25% cleave and deal 20/30/40 bonus damage which increases with each Finger of Death kill. Enemy heroes that die within 3s after getting hit with these melee attacks (or from them) also provide bonus per kill damage. Melee form duration: 20s
Ability can be toggled with right-click to disable the melee form
