Cleave area is a cone with 150 width that increases up to 350 at 650 distance
Aghanim's Scepter now also increases melee cleave from 25% to 50% and duration from 20s to 30s
Aghanim's Scepter no longer decreases cooldown
Lone Druid
Attack projectile speed increased from 900 to 1125
Luna
Abilities
Lunar Blessing
Damage for Allies/Self changed from 1/2 + 1/2 per level up to 1/2 per level
Effective values are not changed
Bonus Night Vision changed from 250 + 25 per level up to 225 + 25 per level
Effective values are not changed
Lunar Orbit
Now applies 8/12/16/20% damage reduction while active
Aghanim's Shard upgrade reworked
Increases damage reduction by 10% and provides Luna with 20% bonus movement speed for the duration
Talents
Level 20 Talent -2s Lucent Beam Cooldown replaced with 1.5x Lunar Orbit Damage / Speed
Level 25 Talent Lunar Blessing Allied/Self Damage decreased from +30/60 to +25/50
Lycan
Abilities
Apex Predator
Damage to neutrals changed from 2% per level to 18% + 2% per level
Summon Wolves
Aghanim's Shard upgrade reworked
Increases the number of wolves by 1 and grants them Hightail ability. Activate it to give them 100% evasion, 20 bonus attack speed, and hasted movement for 6s
Shapeshift
Now grants controlled units movement speed and critical strike bonuses
Talents
Level 25 Talent +2 Wolves Summoned replaced with -25% Summon Wolves BAT
Improves wolves' BAT from 1.2/1.1/1/0.9s to 0.9/0.825/0.75/0.675s
Magnus
Base Agility increased from 12 to 14
Damage at level 1 increased from 55–63 to 56–64
Abilities
Solid Core
No longer levels with Reverse Polarity
Slow Resistance rescaled from 20/30/40/50% to 24% + 1% per level
Empower
Now always affects Magnus with 30% increased values and can't be cast on himself
Skewer
Aghanim's Shard bonus distance increased from +275 to +300
Talents
Level 25 Talent +10% Empower Damage/Cleave replaced with Shockwave Returns to Magnus
Marci
Abilities
Special Delivery
If Marci's courier is in the fountain when Special Delivery is cast, the courier will take all items from the stash before teleporting. The courier will now automatically attempt to transfer items upon teleporting and head back to the fountain. If the courier has any extra items after trying to transfer or didn't transfer any items, it will stay next to Marci
Cooldown changed from 240s to 245s - 5s per level
Bodyguard
Ability Reworked
Has both passive and active components
Passively grants Marci 12/18/24/30% lifesteal and 12/18/24/30% bonus base attack damage
When cast on an ally, she provides them with 75% of passive bonuses and a shared all damage barrier that blocks 90/160/230/300 damage. Damaging the barrier on either Marci or the target will reduce it for both. As Marci attacks heroes, 30% of the damage dealt restores the barrier. Duration: 7s
Cast Range: 500. Mana Cost: 60/65/70/75. Cooldown: 20s. Cast Point: 0.2s
The effect is dispellable. Dispelling Marci will remove the barrier. Dispelling the target will remove both the barrier and passive bonuses (lifesteal and base attack damage)
Rebound
Ability can be set to alt-cast to bring the target ally to the destination. Does not work on rooted or leashed allies
Talents
Level 15 Talent +10% Rebound Movement Speed Bonus replaced with +12% Bodyguard Damage
Level 20 Talent Unleash Movement Speed increased from +10% to +15%
Level 25 Talent +20% Bodyguard Damage replaced with Bodyguard Strong Dispels (Dispels both Marci and the target)
Mars
Abilities
Dauntless
No longer considers Mars's allies when determining if Mars is outnumbered
HP Regen per extra enemy decreased from 70% to 40%
Bulwark
Now a point targeted ability. Mars will face towards the targeted direction when toggled on
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Arena Of Blood
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Lowers cooldown by 10s and increases duration from 5.5s to 6.5s. If an enemy is killed in the Arena, Mars and all of his allies inside the Arena restore 35% of their max health and mana and get a 35% attack damage buff for 20s. This effect stacks
Talents
Level 10 Talent +20% Dauntless Regen Per Enemy replaced with +1.5 Mana Regen
Level 20 Talent -16s Arena Of Blood Cooldown replaced with +70 Arena of Blood Spear Damage
Medusa
Abilities
Gorgon's Grasp
Cooldown decreased from 30/27/24/21s to 30/26/22/18s
Now always centers the cast cursor around the second grouping, even if the number of volleys is increased
Talents
Level 10 Talent Stone Gaze Bonus Physical Damage increased from +10% to +12%
Level 15 Talent Mystic Snake Cooldown Reduction increased from 3s to 4s
Level 15 Talent +8% Split Shot Outgoing Damage replaced with +1 Gorgon's Grasp Volley
Level 20 Talent +1 Gorgon's Grasp Volley replaced with +12% Split Shot Outgoing Damage
Level 20 Talent +3 Mystic Snake Bounces replaced with +40% Mystic Snake Damage / Mana Gain
Level 25 Talent Stone Gaze Duration increased from +2s to +2.5s
Meepo
Base Movement Speed decreased from 320 to 315
Removed Sticky Fingers innate ability
Abilities
Geomancy
New innate ability. Passive, can't be leveled up
Meepo grants stacking bonuses to himself and his clones based on their terrain. Each Meepo grants its bonus to other Meepos. If there is a tree within 250 range, he receives +1 Health Regen. If he is standing on solid ground, he receives 2% bonus movement speed. If he is in the water, his attacks slow the target by 2% for 2 seconds
Each Meepo can provide only one tree bonus, no matter how many trees are within the radius
If there's a tree in the water, Meepo will provide both water and tree bonus
Ransack
Now pierces Debuff Immunity
No longer has separate creep values. Follows global lifesteal rules instead
Has a 40% penalty against creeps
Divided We Stand
Ability reworked
Max Level increased from 3 to 4
Level requirement rescaled from 4/11/18 to 3/10/17/24
No longer passively grants Magic Resistance
Now each duplicate copies all of Meepo's items, but they share their cooldowns. Damage, attack speed, health / mana regeneration, mana burn, and proc chance bonuses from items are distributed equally among the amount of Meepos
Amounting to a 50/66.6/75/80% penalty on each Meepo
Clones can't use consumable shared items on the main Meepo
No longer has a penalty for Strength, Agility, or Intelligence gained from items
Clones no longer gain 30% experience independently
Meepo gains 100% of the experience from Hero Kills or Assists as long as at least one Meepo is in range
Multiple Meepos within experience range does not increase the amount gained
All other experience gained by any Meepo is divided by the number of Meepos
Each Meepo gains experience independently
Talents
Level 25 Talent Health increased from +350 to +400
Mirana
Removed Selemene's Faithful innate ability
Abilities
Celestial Quiver
New innate ability. Auto-cast attack modifier, can't be leveled up
Mirana consumes a charge to empower her next attack with bonus magic damage equal to 3 per Mirana's level. At the start she has 2 max charges but gains 1 more every 7 levels. Base Charge Restore Time: 6s
Upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Casting Leap provides 3 temporary charges for the duration of the buff
These temporary charges ignore the max charges count and stack from each Leap cast
Leap
Aghanim's Shard no longer provides crits during the buff
Still increases max charges by 1
Talents
Level 20 Talent +35 Base Damage replaced with +35 Celestial Quiver Damage
Monkey King
Abilities
Mischief
No longer levels with Wukong's Command
Cooldown changed from 24/20/16/12s to 24.5s - 0.5s per level
Tree Dance
Cast point increased from 0.1s to 0.2s
Cast Range / Perched Tree Cast Range increased from 800 to 900
Cooldown decreased from 1.4/1.2/1.0/0.8s to 0.9/0.6/0.3/0s
Leap speed decreased from 700 to 600
Leaping between trees can now be interrupted by Roots and Leashes
Previously it was only interrupted by Stunned, Hidden, or Hexed statuses
Wukong's Command
Now has Changing of the Guard sub-ability by default
While Wukong's Command is active, Monkey King gains a Changing of the Guard ability which allows him to transform into any one of his soldiers. Upon cast, Monkey King takes the place of the soldier closest to the target location for 1.5s, and leaves another one in his stead. While Transfigured, Monkey King is indistinguishable from other soldiers and invulnerable, but can't issue commands. Cast Point: 0.3s. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 3s
Changing of the Guard
Ability appears in place of Wukong's Command and starts on a 1s cooldown after casting Wukong's Command. Can't be cast while rooted and can't target soldiers created by Aghanim's Scepter effect. Monkey King disjoints projectiles upon transformation.
The possessed soldier has a small ring around it which is visible only to Monkey King and his allies. When the effect is over, Monkey King becomes his usual self leaving the overtaken soldier's position empty.
Talents
Level 10 Talent +90 Primal Spring Max Damage replaced with +350 Tree Dance Cast Range
Level 15 Talent +450 Tree Dance Cast Range replaced with 0 Cooldown Primal Spring
Level 20 Talent 0 Cooldown Primal Spring replaced with Jingu Mastery Undispellable
Morphling
Hero model size now scales on his Agility/Strength ratio
Removed Accumulation innate ability
Abilities
Ebb and Flow
New innate ability. Passive
Strength and Agility provide Morphling with additional bonuses. His cast range and Slow Resistance are increased by a portion of his Strength. His attack range and movement speed are increased by a portion of his Agility. These bonuses are provided even while replicating, except for the extra attack range which is not provided when replicating a melee unit
Strength to Cast Range: 20%. Strength to Slow Resistance: 20%. Agility to Movement Speed: 15%. Agility to Ranged Attack Range: 20%
Waveform
Cast Range decreased from 700/800/900/1000 to 700/775/850/925
Adaptive Strike
Base Damage increased from 25/50/75/100 to 50/70/90/110
Muerta
Abilities
Supernatural
Ability reworked
Whenever an enemy hero dies within 925 units of Muerta, she gains a stack of 1% spell amplification up to a maximum equal to her current level. When Muerta dies she loses half the stacks, rounded down
Passive ethereal bonuses moved to Pierce the Veil
Pierce the Veil
No longer provides 70/100/130 bonus damage
Now grants +75% base damage
Now has a passive component
Muerta can always attack ethereal targets and can attack when she is ethereal. When either she or her target is ethereal, all of her attack damage is dealt as magical damage and her physical lifesteal is treated as spell lifesteal
Lifesteal conversion happens only for attacks and won't affect her spells
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Spectral Slug
New ability granted by Aghanim's Shard
Muerta shoots a spectral bullet at an enemy, dealing damage, knocking them back, and turning them ethereal for 3s, rendering them immune to physical damage and unable to attack. The target is slowed and becomes 20% more vulnerable to magic damage
Range: 500. Mana Cost: 75. Cooldown: 12s. Damage: 225. Slow: 30%. Knockback Distance: 250
Talents
Level 15 Talent +55 Gunslinger Damage replaced with +15 Intelligence
Naga Siren
Abilities
Eelskin
Now provides evasion for Naga Siren on her own
Evasion per Naga changed from 8% to 4.9% + 0.1% per level
Rip Tide
Now always a basic ability for Naga Siren
Talents
Level 10 Talent Reel In Pull Speed increased from +100 to +125
Level 15 Talent Mirror Image Illusion Damage Taken Reduction increased from 50% to 75%
Level 20 Talent Song of the Siren Cooldown Reduction increased from 20s to 25s
Nature's Prophet
Minimum Base damage increased by 4
Damage spread decreased from 10 to 6
Damage at level 1 increased from 40–50 to 44–50
Abilities
Spirit of the Forest
No longer levels with Wrath of Nature
Tree Radius rescaled from 300/400/500/600 to 300 + 10 per level
Multiplier per treant increased from 1x to 2x
Treants also have Spirit of the Forest and gain bonus damage for each nearby tree and treant
Sprout
Vision increased from 250 to 400
Nature's Call
Treant Movespeed rescaled from 305/310/315/320 to 300/315/330/345
Treant Health decreased from 550 to 450
Treants now have 25% Magic Resistance
Treants now deal 4/8/12/16 bonus damage to enemy Heroes
This bonus is also affected by the Treant Damage multiplying talent
Treants now have free pathing through trees
Talents
Level 15 Talent changed from facet specific to +100 Teleportation Barrier
Level 25 Talent 3x Treant HP/Damage no longer affects Spirit of the Forest Multiplier
Necrophos
Abilities
Sadist
No longer levels with Reaper's Scythe
Health and Mana regen rescaled from 3.5/5/6.5/8 to 3.7 + 0.3 per level
Ghost Shroud
Restoration Amplification increased from 55/60/65/70% to 55/65/75/85%
Talents
Level 20 Talent +15% Ghost Shroud Self Restoration Amp replaced with +75 Spell AoE
Level 25 Talent +0.5% Heartstopper Aura Damage replaced with +0.3 Reaper's Scythe Damage Per Missing HP
Night Stalker
Removed Heart of Darkness innate ability
Abilities
Hunter in the Night
Now an innate ability
Move Speed bonus changed from 22/28/34/40% to 24% + 2% per 3 levels
Attack Speed bonus changed from 20/40/60/80 to 38 + 2 per level
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases bonus Movement Speed by 15% and bonus Attack Speed by 50. Killing an enemy hero resets cooldowns of all basic abilities
Void
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Now affects all units within 400 radius around the target
Crippling Fear
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Midnight Feast
New basic ability. Has both passive and active components
Night Stalker heals himself 6/8/10/12 health when attacking enemy units
Attacks on allied units and buildings will not heal Night Stalker
Can be cast at night to eat a non-ancient creep and restore 10/15/20/25% of Night Stalker's maximum health and 10/12/14/16% of his mana. Cast Range: 125. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 39/36/33/30s
Can't be cast on allies
Talents
Level 10 Talent +5s Dark Ascension Duration replaced with +10 Crippling Fear DPS
Level 20 Talent +40 Crippling Fear DPS replaced with +75 Crippling Fear Radius
Level 25 Talent +100 Hunter in the Night Attack Speed replaced with +100 Midnight Feast Lifesteal
Nyx Assassin
Removed Nyxth Sense innate ability
Abilities
Mana Burn
New innate ability. Passive
When Nyx Assassin deals damage with attacks or his abilities, he burns affected unit's mana equal to 12% of damage dealt
Damage reflected with Spiked Carapace also counts
Mind Flare
Now burns 9/12/15/18% of the target's Max Mana
Vendetta
Now also applies a 4s Break on hit
Aghanim's Shard reworked
Decreases cooldown by 10s. For the first 15s, Nyx Assassin is hasted and has unobstructed pathing
Ogre Magi
Abilities
Fireblast
Now also upgraded by Aghanim's Scepter
Becomes Refined Fireblast, reducing its cooldown by 1s and increasing its cast speed by 25%
Multicast
Each point of Strength increases chances of Multicast by 0.0625%, so every 16 Strength points add 1%
Unrefined Fireblast
Cooldown increased from 6s to 7s
Talents
Level 10 Talent -1s Fireblast Cooldown replaced with +2/0.01 Dumb Luck Mana / Mana Regen Per Strength
Level 10 Talent Ignite Burn Damage decreased from +12 to +10
Level 15 Talent +2/0.01 Dumb Luck Mana / Mana Regen Per Strength replaced with +20/35 Bloodlust / Self Attack Speed
Level 20 Talent +35 Bloodlust Attack Speed replaced with +175 Fireblast Damage
Level 25 Talent +220 Fireblast Damage replaced with +10% Multicast Chances (affects all types of multicast)
Omniknight
Base Armor decreased by 1
Agility gain decreased from 2.0 to 1.7
Abilities
Degen Aura
No longer levels with Guardian Angel
Movement Slow changed from 10/20/30/40% to 11% + 1% per level
Purification
Now pierces Debuff Immunity on enemies (previously only pierced Debuff Immunity on allies)
Repel
Cooldown decreased from 50/45/40/35s to 40/36/32/28s
No longer provides bonus Strength
No longer provides bonus Strength / HP Regen per Debuff
As a result, provides only Debuff Immunity with 60% magic resistance, and 8/12/16/20 bonus health regen. Has no effects per dispelled debuffs
Hammer of Purity
Now pierces Debuff Immunity
Cooldown decreased from 20/15/10/5s to 13/10/7/4s
Bonus Base Damage decreased from 55/70/85/100% to 30/50/70/90%
Damage decreased from 25/50/75/100 to 20/40/60/80
Now heals Omniknight for 30% of the damage dealt over the next 5s
Guardian Angel
Now is a no-target ability. The effect is applied in an aura centered around Omniknight that follows him
Has no linger duration
Duration decreased from 5/6/7s to 4/4.5/5s
Radius increased from 400 to 700
Aghanim's Scepter reworked
Becomes global, affects buildings, and amplifies health restoration by 100%
Talents
Level 10 Talent Base Damage decreased from +35 to +30
Level 10 Talent +1s Repel Duration replaced with +200 Repel Cast Range
Level 15 Talent +5 Repel Strength/HP Regen Per Debuff replaced with -0.5s Hammer of Purity Cooldown
Level 20 Talent +2s Guardian Angel Duration replaced with +125 Degen Aura radius
Oracle
Abilities
Prognosticate
Oracle now also predicts Roshan's exact respawn timer
False Promise
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Diviner's Deck
New passive ability granted by Aghanim's Scepter
Oracle receives a Tarot Card Buff now and every 90 seconds. This buff is undispellable and lasts until the next one replaces it. Oracle knows which buff will be next.
Death: +40% Spell Amplification
The Fool: +100% Gold Gain
The World: +150% Intelligence
The Lovers: +40% Heal Amplification
The Tower: Gain a 400 all-damage barrier which regenerates after not taking damage for 7s
Talents
Level 15 Talent Fortune's End Heals/Damages for 80 Per Effect Dispelled replaced with +100 Fortune's End Radius
Outworld Destroyer
Base Agility decreased from 22 to 17
Base Armor decreased by 1
Removed OD innate
Aka Ominous Discernment, aka Obstreperous Dissimilator, aka Obnoxious Determinator, aka Obsequious Deliberator, aka Ornery Deconstructor, aka Obnubilated Delineator, aka Omniscient Desiderator
Abilities
Essence Flux
Now an innate ability
Max Mana Restore now depends on the ability it procced on
For regular abilities Max Mana Restoration changed from 25/35/45/55% to 40% + 5% per 5 levels
For attack modifiers that spend mana Max Mana Restoration changed from 25/35/45/55% to 25% + 5% per 5 levels
Objurgation
New basic ability. Has both passive and active components
Increases maximum mana by 80/160/240/320
Can be activated to create an all damage barrier equal to 120/180/240/300 + 12% of Outworld Destroyer's max mana. Duration: 10s. Mana Cost: 250. Cooldown: 36/34/32/30s
Barrier can be dispelled
Multiple instances of Objurgation barrier stack
Upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases Max Mana to Barrier by 4%. Damage that would bring Outworld Destroyer below 20% is prevented, triggering a strong dispel and an automatic instance of undispellable Objurgation. This effect cannot trigger more than once every 80s, but refreshes on death
Sanity's Eclipse
Cooldown decreased from 150/135/120s to 140/130/120s
Radius decreased from 450/525/600 to 450/500/550
Talents
Level 15 Talent +8% Astral Imprisonment Mana Capacity Steal replaced with +5% Essence Flux Mana Restored
Level 20 Talent +0.15 Sanity's Eclipse Mana Difference Multiplier replaced with +10% Astral Imprisonment Mana Capacity Steal
Level 20 Talent +450 Health replaced with -10s Objurgation Cooldown
Pangolier
Abilities
Swashbuckle
Slow Duration increased from 0.4s to 0.6s
Shield Crash
Damage increased from 50/100/150/200 to 60/120/180/240
Lucky Shot
Armor Reduction decreased from 3/5/7/9 to 2/4/6/8
Rolling Thunder
Stun Duration increased from 0.8/1/1.2s to 1.2s
Phantom Assassin
Abilities
Blur
No longer levels with Coup de Grace
Vanish Radius rescaled from 625/550/475/400 to 500
Vanish Buffer rescaled from 0.4/0.6/0.8/1s to 0.8s
Active Movement Speed changed from 6/9/12/15% to 9.5% + 0.5% per level
Phantom Lancer
Abilities
Illusory Armaments
Min Damage increase changed from 2% per 3 level ups to 2% per 3 levels
This means two things: bonus damage increases 1 level earlier (on levels 3/6/9... instead of 4/7/10...) and Phantom Lancer will gain one more damage increase on level 30
Phoenix
Removed Blinding Sun innate ability
Abilities
Dying Light
New innate ability
Phoenix deals 4% of its missing health as magic damage to all enemies in a 400 radius every second. Damage tick rate: 0.2s
This effect is also present during Supernova
Damage is calculated as if Phoenix was still present with the same health and health regen it had at the moment of the cast
Talents
Level 10 Talent +0.5% Blinding Sun Miss Chance replaced with +1% Dying Light Missing Health as Damage
Primal Beast
Abilities
Colossal
Innate ability reworked
Primal Beast has 10% base Slow Resistance and gains +0.5% Area of Effect and +1% Slow Resistance for every 100 Max Health
Pulverize
AoE Radius decreased from 600 to 575
Talents
Level 25 Talent Cannot Be Slowed Or Rooted During Trample replaced with Colossal 2x Bonuses During Trample
Puck
Abilities
Puckish
Health/Mana Restore rescaled from 10 + 2% to 3%
Also unified into a single value
Spell Dodge Multiplier decreased from 3.5x to 3x
Illusory Orb
Now has curved vector targeting by default
Can be put on alt-cast to to launch the orb straight
Speed increased from 550 to 750
Now additionally deals 3% of orb's Impact Damage every 0.5s in its AoE
Pudge
Abilities
Flesh Heap
No longer levels with Dismember
Permanent Bonus Strength rescaled from 1.1/1.4/1.7/2.0 to 1.6
Rot
No longer has a separate value for incoming heal reduction
Still reduces incoming heals due to Health Restoration changes
Pugna
Base Movement Speed decreased from 330 to 325
Abilities
Oblivion Savant
Now also increases Pugna's Spell Amplification by 1.5% per destroyed tower
Nether Ward
Damage source changed from Nether Ward to the caster
Queen of Pain
Abilities
Scream Of Pain
Damage increased from 75/150/225/300 to 90/175/260/345
25% of the damage dealt to heroes with this ability is reflected back to her
Does not trigger on damage to illusions. Damage done is nonlethal reflection damage
Also applies to Scream of Pain instances cast by Shadow Strike upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Talents
Level 20 Talent Scream of Pain Damage increased from +100 to +115
Razor
Abilities
Static Link
Damage Drain Rate increased from 5/10/15/20 to 6/12/18/24
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Storm Surge
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
While Eye of the Storm is active, Storm Surge's strike chance is 2x as high, strike cooldown is decreased by 2s, and lightning strikes all enemies within Eye of the Storm's radius
Talents
Level 10 Talent +10% Spell Lifesteal replaced with +4 Armor
Level 20 Talent Storm Surge Slow and Damage increased from +25% to +30%
Riki
Abilities
Backstab
Agility Multiplier changed from 0.6 + 0.05 per level up to 0.55 + 0.05 per level
Effective values are not changed
Smoke Screen
Mana Cost rescaled from 65/70/75/80 to 75
Miss Rate rescaled from 30/45/60/75% to 40/50/60/70%
Blink Strike
Slow Duration increased from 0.5s to 0.75s
Tricks of the Trade
Aghanim's Scepter bonus Cast Range increased from +300 to +500
Ringmaster
Abilities
Dark Carnival Barker
Pool of souvenirs now always consists of Funhouse Mirror, Strongman Tonic, Unicycle and Whoopee Cushion
Escape Act
Targeted unit is no longer stunned for 0.5 seconds when placed in a box
Radius and Aghanim's Scepter's Explosion Radius now affected by AoE bonuses
Impalement Arts
Charges rescaled from 1/2/3/4 to 3
Mana Cost decreased from 80 to 50
Impact damage rescaled from 50 to 20/35/50/65
Max Health Damage per second (heroes) rescaled from 3.5/4/4.5/5% to 3/4/5/6%
Damage per second (creeps) decreased from 100 to 85/90/95/100
Slow Duration decreased from 0.8s to 0.5/0.6/0.7/0.8s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +85 Impalement Arts Impact Damage replaced with +1 Impalement Arts Charge
Rubick
Base Damage increased by 1
Damage at level 1 increased from 49–55 to 50–56
Removed Might and Magus innate ability
Abilities
Curiosity
New innate ability. Passive, can't be leveled up
Rubick gains 1 stack of Curiosity per level, each granting him +1 base damage, +0.3% Buff/Debuff Duration, and +2 Area of Effect bonus. If Rubick sees an enemy Hero cast an ability within 1200 distance of him, he gains 2 Curiosity for 20 seconds. If an enemy that currently provides temporary Curiosity dies within 3s after taking damage from Rubick, he gains 1 Curiosity permanently
Telekinesis
Aghanim's Shard throw distance bonus changed from 35% to 225
Fade Bolt
Now reduces both spell and attack damage by default
Damage Reduction rescaled from 5/15/25/35% to 6/12/18/24%
Spell Steal
No longer grants 10/20/30% Debuff Amplification
Stolen spells now have their cooldown decreased by 10/20/30%
Talents
Level 10 Talent +0.25% Might and Magus Damage/Resistance replaced with +200 Health
Level 10 Talent +165 Telekinesis Landing Damage replaced with -2s Telekinesis Cooldown
Level 15 Talent +20% Fade Bolt Damage Reduction replaced with -3s Fade Bolt Cooldown
Level 15 Talent -25% Stolen Spells Cooldown replaced with -50% Stolen Spells Mana Cost
Level 20 Talent -5s Telekinesis Cooldown replaced with Telekinesis Landing Deals 325 Damage (now this talent applies damage to the thrown enemy as well)
It used to deal damage only in AoE, leaving the thrown enemy unharmed. Doesn't deal damage to thrown allies or self
Level 20 Talent -5s Fade Bolt Cooldown replaced with +12% Fade Bolt Damage Reduction
Level 25 Talent +400 Telekinesis Land Distance replaced with 2x Curiosity Bonuses
Sand King
Abilities
Caustic Finale
No longer levels with Epicenter
Base Damage rescaled from 20/40/60/80 to 17 + 3 per level
Max Health Damage rescaled from 3/7/11/15% to 2.5% + 0.5% per level
Duration decreased from 4.5/5/5.5/6s to 4.5s
Burrowstrike
Cast Range increased from 525/600/675/750 to 550/625/700/775
Sand King now immediately re-gains invisibility if the Burrowstrike ends within Sand Storm's AoE
Talents
Level 20 Talent +75/7 Base/Incremental Radius of Epicenter replaced with +6 Epicenter Pulses
Level 25 Talent 50% Sand Storm Slow replaced with 35% Sand Storm Slow and Blind
Level 25 Talent +8 Epicenter Pulses replaced with +125 Stinger Damage
Shadow Demon
Abilities
Menace
Damage amplification changed from 2.5% to 1.9% + 0.1% per level
Disruption
Can now target Spirit Bear
Disseminate
Shared Damage rescaled from 20/25/30/35% to 16/24/32/40%
Talents
Level 20 Talent +150 Demonic Purge Damage replaced with -20s Demonic Purge Cooldown
Level 25 Talent -30s Demonic Purge Cooldown replaced with Demonic Purge Applies Shadow Poison
1 stack per second over the debuff duration
Shadow Fiend
Abilities
Necromastery
No longer levels with Requiem of Souls
Damage per soul rescaled from 1/2/3/4 to 1.35 + 0.15 damage per level
Base Max Souls decreased from 20/22/24/26 to 20
Shadowraze
Damage decreased from 90/160/230/300 to 85/150/215/280
Now damage is increased by 3 per Necromastery soul
Aghanim's Shard now also applies a stacking 12% slow debuff to enemies hit
Feast of Souls
No longer requires 5 souls to cast
Instead, Shadow Fiend gains souls from surrounding enemies
Shadow Fiend gains souls from 2 enemies in a 600 radius every 0.5s, prioritizing heroes. Each individual enemy can provide souls once, with creeps giving 1 soul and heroes providing 3. Can collect souls from up to 4/6/8/10 enemies. After the effect is over, Shadow Fiend loses the souls whose owners are still alive, retaining the rest for 8s
The enemy threshold doesn't limit an amount of souls collected, and limits only the amount of enemies affected. So, at the limit of 10, you can collect souls from 5 heroes and 5 creeps gaining 20 souls. 10 Dummy Targets in Hero Demo mode will provide 30 souls
Bonus Attack Speed decreased from 40/55/70/85 to 35/50/65/80
Bonus Move Speed decreased from 5/7/9/11% to 4/6/8/10%
Requiem of Souls
Now can't use more than 20 souls per cast
Aghanim's Scepter no longer has a damage penalty on the returning Requiem of Souls
Talents
Level 15 Talent +120 Shadowraze Damage replaced with +2 Feast of Souls Souls Collected Per Hero
Level 20 Talent +2 Damage Per Soul replaced with +5 Necromastery Max Souls
Shadow Shaman
Abilities
Fowl Play
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Now adds a chicken illusion per 5 levels
Now also provides bonus movement speed equal to 5% + 5% per 5 levels
Urnaconda
New ability granted by Aghanim's Shard
Throws a jar at a location, dealing 275 damage to all enemies in a 225 radius and creating a Massive Serpent Ward that lasts for 15s. The ward has 4x health and damage of the normal Serpent Wards. Cooldown: 50s. Mana Cost: 115. Cast Range: 650
Silencer
Base Movement Speed increased from 290 to 300
Reworked Brain Drain ability into a new innate
Abilities
Suffer In Silence
New innate ability. Passive
Silencer takes less damage from and deals more damage to silenced targets. Damage modifier is 5% + 0.5% per level for both reduction and amplification
If an enemy hero dies within 925 range of Silencer or was debuffed by Silencer at the time of death, Silencer permanently steals 1 Intelligence from them. If the victim was silenced, an extra 1 point of Intelligence will be stolen
Arcane Curse
No longer has 1.25x slow and damage multiplier against silenced enemies
Glaives of Wisdom
Mana Cost decreased from 14/16/18/20 to 12/14/16/18
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Increases Int Steal by 1 and causes Glaives to bounce once to a random enemy within 450 range
Talents
Level 10 Talent +0.25 Arcane Curse Silenced Multiplier replaced with +7% Suffer In Silence Damage
Level 25 Talent Glaives of Wisdom Damage increased from +25% to +30%
Level 25 Talent 2 Arcane Curse charges replaced with +2s Global Silence Duration
Skywrath Mage
Removed Ruin and Restoration innate ability
Abilities
Shield of the Scion
New innate ability. Passive
Whenever Skywrath Mage deals magical damage with his abilities to an enemy hero, he gains a magic damage barrier equal to 13.5 + 1.5 per level for 12s. Each instance stacks independently
Concussive Shot
Now considers Spirit Bear as a true hero for prioritization. Creep Heroes are now considered as secondary targets
Slardar
Abilities
Seaborn Sentinel
No longer levels with Corrosive Haze
Bonus HP Regen changed from 2.5/5/7.5/10 to 1.75 + 0.25 per level
Aghanim's Scepter Bonus HP Regen decreased from +22 to +20
Bonus Armor changed from 3/4/5/6 to 1.8 + 0.2 per level
Aghanim's Scepter Bonus Armor decreased from +10 to +8
Flat 8/16/24/32 bonus damage replaced with 11.4% bonus attack damage + 0.6% per level
Guardian Sprint
Slardar now has 100% slow resistance for the first 2.5s of Guardian Sprint. This bonus fades to 0 over the remaining duration
Talents
Level 10 Talent +14 Seaborn Sentinel Bonus Attack Damage replaced with +30 Bash of the Deep Damage
Level 15 Talent +40 Bash of the Deep Damage replaced with -3 Corrosive Haze Armor
Level 20 Talent -4 Corrosive Haze Armor replaced with +16% Seaborn Sentinel Bonus Attack Damage
Slark
Abilities
Essence Shift
Duration changed from 15s + 2.5s per level up to 12.5s + 2.5s per level
Effective values are not changed
Saltwater Shiv
Stacks now have independent durations and don't refresh previous ones
Cooldown increased from 10/8/6/4s to 14/12/10/8s
Mana Cost increased from 20 to 25/30/35/40
Cast Range is now Slark's attack range + 50
Stack Restoration Steal increased from 2/4/6/8% to 4/8/12/16%
Stack Regen Steal increased from 2/4/6/8 to 4/8/12/16
Stack Speed Steal increased from 2/4/6/8 to 4/8/12/16
Now also modifies incoming healing
As a result of Health Restoration changes
Snapfire
Removed Buckshot innate ability
Abilities
Boomstick
New innate ability. Passive
Snapfire deals more damage with her attacks and abilities, the closer she is to her target. Min Damage Amp is 0% at a distance of 495 + 5 per level. Max Damage Amp is 35% damage amp at a distance of 50 + 5 per level
Scatterblast
Point-blank damage bonus decreased from 50% to 30%
Talents
Level 15 Talent Lil' Shredder Attacks increased from +1 to +2
Sniper
Abilities
Keen Scope
No longer levels with Assassinate
No longer increases attack range
Now increases damage from Sniper's attacks by 1.5% + 0.05% per level for every 100 units of distance between him and the target
Also affects attack damage from Assassinate
Take Aim
Now passively grants 160/240/320/400 attack range
Active Bonus Attack Range rescaled from 100/150/200/250 to 75/150/225/300
Assassinate
No longer amplifies attack damage to 100/110/120%
Talents
Level 10 Talent +55 Take Aim Attack Range Bonus replaced with +50 Take Aim Passive Attack Range
Spectre
Base Movement Speed increased from 290 to 295
Base Health Regen increased from 1.0 to 1.5
Abilities
Desolate
Damage changed from 25 + 2 per level up to 23 + 2 per level
Effective values are not changed
Shadow Step
Cooldown decreased from 30/26/22/18s to 24/21/18/15s
Cast Range increased from 750/900/1050/1200 to 825/950/1075/1200
Illusion Damage increased from 32/38/44/50% to 35/40/45/50%
Illusion Damage Taken decreased from 200% to 200/185/170/155%
Haunt
Cooldown decreased from 180/160/140s to 160/150/140s
Duration rescaled from 5/6/7s to 6s
Illusion Damage decreased from 30/55/80% to 30/50/70%
Spirit Breaker
Removed Herd Mentality innate ability
Abilities
Empowering Haste
New innate ability. Passive
Spirit Breaker gains bonus Movement Speed whenever he stuns an enemy. Effect depends on the unit type: stunning a hero will provide a 8% bonus for 2s, while other units provide 2% for 1s
Effects from multiple stuns stack and have independent durations. Bull Rush duration is paused during Charge of Darkness, but it can still gain new stacks. This effect allows Spirit Breaker to go over the max movement speed limit
Charge of Darkness
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Greater Bash
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases knockback by roughly 30%. If a knocked-back enemy collides with another enemy, the second enemy is also bashed, and the original target takes 25% of Spirit Breaker's Greater Bash damage again
This effect is applied to Charge of Darkness and Nether Strike as well, since those abilities use Greater Bash
Creeps take 25% damage of repeated damage
Bodies of killed units keep flying and pushing enemies
Planar Pocket
Now granted by Aghanim's Shard
Cooldown increased from 25s to 30s
Self Magic Resistance decreased from 75% to 40%
Effect now ends if Spirit Breaker is more than 900 units away from the target
Now can be cast without cancelling Charge of Darkness
Talents
Level 15 Talent +45 Damage replaced with +60 Charge of Darkness Bonus Speed
Level 20 Talent -0.3s Greater Bash Cooldown replaced with +8%/+2% Empowering Haste Movespeed Bonus
Storm Spirit
Abilities
Galvanized
Leveling up Ball Lightning no longer grants 3 Galvanized charges
Static Remnant
Remnants now spawn at Storm Spirit's location and move at 300 speed to the target location
Sven
Base strength increased from 23 to 24
Damage at level 1 increased from 60–62 to 61–63
Removed Vanquisher innate ability
Abilities
Wrath of God
New innate ability
Increases attack damage Sven gains per point of Strength by 0.08 + 0.02 per level. Disabled by Break
Warcry
Aghanim's Shard reworked
No longer provides a passive aura
Makes Warcry undispellable and increases radius from 700 to 900. Warcry provides a 300 physical damage barrier and an additional +3% movespeed bonus when active
Talents
Level 10 Talent +10% Vanquisher Bonus Damage replaced with +20% God's Strength Slow Resistance
Level 20 Talent +20% God's Strength Slow Resistance replaced with -25% Storm Hammer Cooldown and Mana Cost
Techies
Abilities
M.A.D.
New innate ability. Passive
Increases mana regen by a portion of Techies' max mana equal to 0.08% + 0.02% per level
When Techies die, they leave behind a barrel that explodes after 1.5s, dealing magical damage equal to 50 + 30% of their max mana to enemies in a 400 area of effect. The barrel provides 400 obstructed vision until it explodes
Upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Increases mana to damage by 10%. Adds an active component. Techies plant the M.A.D. barrel, and detonate it later by using a sub-ability. The M.A.D. barrel is invisible and can be destroyed before the detonation process begins. Detonating the barrel makes it visible and immortal, and then it explodes after the same 1.5s delay. Only one M.A.D. can exist via the active cast at one time. Barrel Health: 200. Cast Range: 450. No Mana Cost. Cooldown: 30s. Cast Point: 1s
Reactive Tazer
Can now always be cast on allies
Cast Range increased from 500 to 600
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Blast Off!
Now deals its self damage before damaging enemies
Techies are now rooted and disarmed instead of self-stunned during Blast Off's leap animation
Proximity Mines
Damage source changed from Proximity Mines to the caster
Minefield Sign
Now only available with Aghanim's Scepter
Talents
Level 15 Talent +3 Mana Regen replaced with +25% Reactive Tazer Buff and Disarm Duration
Level 25 Talent Damage increased from +252 to +253
Templar Assassin
Base Health Regen decreased from 1 to 0
Removed Third Eye innate ability
Abilities
Inner Peace
New innate ability, improves with Templar Assassin's level
After remaining stationary for 0.25s, Templar Assassin begins meditating, gaining bonus health regen and mana regen. Bonuses linearly increase from 0 up to their maximum, which is reached after 2.05s - 0.05s per level. Moving from the current position or taking damage from an enemy resets regen bonuses. Max Health Regen is 2.7 + 0.3 per level. Max Mana Regen is 2.2 + 0.2 per level
Refraction
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Increases bonus damage by 30 and allows Refraction to be cast while disabled
Meld
Now, if the attack that broke Meld splits with Psi Blades, Bonus Damage and Armor Reduction are now applied to all affected enemies
Psionic Trap
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
When activated, Traps now also silence enemies from 0.25s up to 3s depending on the trap charge
Talents
Level 15 Talent +3 Meld Armor reduction replaced with +3 Psionic Traps
Level 15 Talent Refraction Can Be Cast While Disabled replaced with +225 Meld Attack Range
Level 20 Talent +40 Refraction Damage replaced with +4 Meld Armor Reduction
Terrorblade
Base Armor increased by 1
Abilities
Conjure Image
Illusion Damage increased from 20/25/30/35% to 25/30/35/40%
Demon Zeal
Cooldown decreased from 60s to 45s
Duration decreased from 30s to 25s
Talents
Level 15 Talent +15% Reflection Slow/Damage replaced with -25% Sunder Minimum HP Swap
Tidehunter
Strength gain increased from 3.6 to 3.7
Removed Blubber innate ability
Abilities
Leviathan's Catch
New Innate Ability. Passive
Whenever an enemy hero dies while affected by any Tidehunter's debuff or is killed by him, they drop a fish. Tidehunter can eat the fish to grow in size and permanently gain 3 Max Health, 2 Attack Range and 1 Bonus Damage Block. Tidehunter automatically eats a fish on every level up
Bonus Damage Block is only applied if there is a source of damage block being applied to an incoming physical attack
The fish flies 400 units towards Tidehunter upon spawning, stays in the world indefinitely and can be destroyed by an attack from Tidehunter's enemies
Anchor Smash
Radius changed from 375 to 225 + Tidehunter's Attack Range
Kraken Shell
Now applies a strong dispel to Tidehunter if he takes more than 600/550/500/450 damage within 7 seconds
Talents
Level 20 Talent Blubber effect triggers Anchor Smash replaced with Kraken Shell Cleanse triggers Anchor Smash
Timbersaw
Abilities
Exposure Therapy
No longer levels with Chakram
Mana gain per tree destroyed changed from 4/6/8/10 to 3.75 + 0.25 per level
Tinker
Base health regen increased from 0 to 0.5
Base Movement Speed decreased from 310 to 305
Removed Defense Matrix ability
Abilities
Laser
Aghanim's Scepter no longer adds bounces
March of the Machines
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Robots apply a non-stacking heal over time of 35 health per second to allies they come through. Heal duration: 4 seconds
Deploy Turrets
New ability that replaces Defense Matrix
After a 0.5s delay, airdrops a group of three uncontrollable turrets at the target 250 radius area, dealing 40/80/120/160 magical damage, destroying trees and pushing away enemies by 100 units and Tinker by 350. Turrets seek enemy heroes within 650/700/750/800 range and shoot missiles in their direction every 1.5 seconds. The missile deals 20/40/60/80 magical damage to the enemy it hits and 50% of the damage to other enemies within 200 AoE. Each turret has 40/80/120/160 health and exists for 4.5 seconds
Each of three turrets activates with a small delay after the previous one, activating 0.1s, 0.6s, and 1.1s after deployment
The missile flies in a forward direction and can be dodged by moving out of its way
Turrets target heroes only, but missiles can hit creeps on their way
Turrets prioritize the same hero until they are out of reach
Splash damage is not dealt to the hit unit itself
Gold Bounty: 5/10/15/20. XP Bounty: 5/10/15/20. Turn Rate: 0.55. Missile Speed: 1200. Missile Flight Distance: 650/700/750/800
Cast Range: 600. Mana Cost: 100/120/140/160. Cooldown: 24/22/20/18s. Cast Point: 0.1s
Upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Turrets activate 0.3s faster, and fire missiles 20% faster, which results in firing one additional volley of missiles
Rearm
Cooldown decreased from 7/6/5s to 5.5/5/4.5s
Warp Flare
Teleport distance now depends on Warp Flare cast range and scales with distance from Tinker, so that nearby enemies are teleported further than far enemies
Max teleportation distance is 60% of Warp Flare's cast range which decreases down to 0 at the max cast range (700 by default)
Talents
Level 15 Talent +60 Defense Matrix Damage Barrier replaced with +100 Deploy Turrets Tinker Knockback
Level 20 Talent +10% Defense Matrix Status Resistance replaced with +60 Deploy Turrets Missile Damage
Level 25 Talent: +40 Intelligence replaced with -0.25s Time to Rearm
Level 25 Talent: Laser AoE increased from 200 to 250
Tiny
Removed Craggy Exterior innate ability
Abilities
Insurmountable
New innate ability
Slow Resistance now also applies to Attack Speed Slows. Tiny gains Slow Resistance equal to 20% of his Strength and Status Resistance equal to 10% of his Strength
Avalanche
Mana Cost increased from 95/110/125/140 to 105/120/135/150
Damage decreased from 100/190/280/370 to 90/180/270/360
Toss
Mana Cost rescaled from 110/125/140/155 to 125
Tree Grab
Mana Cost decreased from 40 to 40/35/30/25
Cooldown decreased from 16/15/14/13s to 15/12/9/6s
Cast Range increased from 165 to 200
Attacks rescaled from 5 to 4/5/6/7
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Tree Throw
No longer applies a slow on the tossed tree by default
Grow
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Thrown trees and tossed units deal 20% more damage in their AoE, have +125 radius, and apply a 25% movement slow and a 45 attack speed slow to all units in the AoE of Toss, Tree Throw, and Tree Volley for 2.5s
Damage is not increased for the Tossed unit itself
Tree Volley
Now uses the bonus damage value of Tree Throw and bonuses from Aghanim's Shard
Talents
Level 10 Talent Avalanche Cast Range decreased from +200 to +150
Level 15 Talent Avalanche Damage decreased from +100 to +90
Treant Protector
Abilities
Nature's Guise
Cooldown changed from 35s - 1s per level up to 36s -1s per level
Effective values are not changed
Living Armor
Mana Cost increased from 40/45/50/55 to 65/70/75/80
Max Damage Blocked decreased from 120 to 60/80/100/120
Damage Block Decrease improved from 35/30/25/20 to 20
Eyes In The Forest
Charge Restore Time increased from 55s to 135s
Duration increased from 300s to 360s
Max Charges decreased from 3 to 2
Troll Warlord
Abilities
Battle Stance
Troll Warlord gains 1 armor per 30 bonus attack speed
Berserker's Rage
No longer provides +3/4/5/6 Bonus Armor while in melee form
Talents
Level 15 Talent +115 Whirling Axes Damage replaced with +1s Battle Trance Duration
Level 20 Talent +10 Berserker's Rage Armor replaced with +160 Whirling Axes Damage
Level 20 Talent +1.5s Battle Trance Duration replaced with Allies Receive Battle Trance Attack Speed
Tusk
Abilities
Bitter Chill
No longer levels with Walrus Punch!
Attack Speed Slow rescaled from 20/40/60/80 to 17 + 3 per level
Now only affects enemy heroes
Tag Team
Now always a basic ability for Tusk
Ice Shards
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Drinking Buddies
Now granted by Aghanim's Shard
Tusk reaches out to tag an allied unit, pulling them closer. Once tagged, both Tusk and his tagged ally gain 25% bonus movement speed and 10 bonus armor for 6s. Can be put on alt-cast to only pull Tusk towards his ally with 50% reduced cast range. Cast Range: 1000. Mana Cost: 80. Cooldown: 14s
No longer provides 20/50/80/110 bonus attack damage
Talents
Level 20 Talent -6s Ice Shards Cooldown replaced with -6s Snowball Cooldown
Level 25 Talent -8s Snowball Cooldown replaced with Ice Shards Slow by 50% and Deal 110 DPS (only affects enemies trapped inside)
Underlord
Abilities
Invading Force
No longer levels with Fiend's Gate
Damage Reduction rescaled from 4/6/8/10% to 3.7% + 0.3% per level
Movement Speed bonus rescaled from 11/14/17/20% to 9.5% + 0.5% per level
Firestorm
Wave Damage increased from 30/50/70/90 to 30/55/80/105
Atrophy Aura
Damage Reduction increased from 6/14/22/30% to 8/16/24/32%
Talents
Level 15 Talent Firestorm Cooldown Reduction increased from 4s to 5s
Level 25 Talent Fiend's Gate DPS increased from 125 to 160
Undying
Base Agility increased from 10 to 13
Base Armor decreased by 1
Abilities
Flesh Golem
Attacks now spawn the current level of Tombstone Zombie
Vengeful Spirit
Base Movement Speed increased from 295 to 300
Base Attack Time improved from 1.7s to 1.5s
Abilities
Retribution
Now also makes Vengeful Spirit to gain benefits of both melee and ranged attacks
Now killer's icon is shown as a buff on Vengeful Spirit to know who to hate
Vengeance Aura
Now provides 1.2x the bonus for Vengeful Spirit herself
Aghanim's Scepter upgrade no longer refreshes ability cooldowns on activating
Aghanim's Scepter now increases self-bonus up to 1.3x
Aghanim's Scepter illusion is now fully affected by Vengeance Aura's bonus
Aghanim's Scepter illusion damage taken decreased from 115% to 100%
Venomancer
Removed Septic Shock innate ability
Abilities
Poison Sting
Now an innate ability
Imbues Venomancer's attack with poison, which deals damage per second equal to 9 + 1 per level and slows movement by 10%. Duration: 4.5s + 0.5s per level
Venomous Gale
Aghanim's Shard upgrade reworked
Increases cast range and projectile speed by 25%. Creates 2 Plague Wards around every enemy hero hit
Snakebite
New Basic Ability
Venomancer summons a Spawn of Aktok to sink its fangs into an enemy, dealing 40/60/80/100 magic damage and applying a deadly toxin which does 20/25/30/35 magical damage per second for 6 seconds. When the target attacks, they take the initial magic damage again. Cast Range: 600. Mana Cost: 70/80/90/100. Cooldown: 20/18/16/14s
Noxious Plague
Ability reworked
No longer has AoE effect, now affects only the host
Now when the plague spreads, it also carries all debuffs placed by Venomancer
Doesn't stack. Applying plague to an already plague-infected unit will deal projectile damage again, but won't affect the remaining debuff duration. Duration of carried debuffs is fixed and cannot be altered with Status Resistance or Debuff Amplification
Mana Cost decreased from 200/300/400 to 200/250/300
Duration decreased from 5s to 4s
Initial Damage decreased from 200/300/400 to 150/200/250
Initial Damage is now non-lethal
Now spreads a second time, but all spreads after the first one deal no initial damage
Spread Radius decreased from 800 to 700
Max HP as damage decreased from 3/4/5% to 2/3/4%
Now upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Decreases cooldown by 35s. Reduces Magic Resistance of affected units by 20% and allows additional spreads to deal initial damage
Talents
Level 15 Talent Poison Sting Slow increased from +5% to +7%
Level 15 Talent -1s Plague Ward Cooldown replaced with +75 Noxious Plague Spread Radius
Level 20 Talent +50 Base Damage replaced with -2s Plague Ward Cooldown
Level 20 Talent +1% Noxious Plague Max HP Damage replaced with +40% Snakebite Damage (applies to both initial damage and damage per second)
Level 25 Talent Noxious Plague Aura reduces 200 Attack Speed replaced with Snakebite Undispellable
Viper
Agility gain increased from 2.7 to 2.9
Base Attack Speed decreased from 120 to 110
Abilities
Predator
Base Damage per Missing Health Percentage increased from 0.15 to 0.25
Corrosive Skin
Aghanim's Scepter now also gradually increases Corrosive Skin's magic resistance and damage per second while he is in Nethertoxin, up to 50% increased effect after 4s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +10% Poison Attack slow/damage replaced with +15 Corrosive Skin Damage Per Second
Level 15 Talent +20 Corrosive Skin Damage Per Second replaced with +15% Poison Attack Slow / Damage
Level 15 Talent +30 Nethertoxin Min/Max Damage replaced with +20/40 Nethertoxin Min/Max Damage
Level 20 Talent Predator Damage Per Missing Health increased from +0.3 to +0.35
Visage
Removed Lurker innate ability
Abilities
Silent as the Grave
Now innate ability. Active
Visage gains flying movement and 12% bonus movement speed for 20s. Upon attacking or casting, he loses both effects, but he and his familiars gain 10% attack damage bonus for 2 seconds
Mana Cost decreased from 115 to 50
Cooldown changed from 45s to 45.75s - 0.75s per level
Upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Increases bonus movement speed by 12%, bonus damage by 10%, bonus damage duration by 2s, and flight duration by 10s. While flight is active, Silent as the Grave grants invisibility to Visage and his familiars
Invisibility for Visage and each familiar are not connected
Summon Familiars
Cooldown decreased from 130/120/110s to 120/110/100s
Familiar Health rescaled from 500/600/700 to 450/600/750
Talents
Level 10 Talent +6 Visage and Familiars Attack Damage replaced with +6 Visage and Familiars Base Damage
Level 10 Talent +4 Lurker Max Stacks replaced with -1s Soul Assumption Cooldown
Level 20 Talent Soul Assumption Damage Per Charge increased from +25 to +30
Void Spirit
Base Damage decreased by 4
Damage at level 1 unchanged due to innate ability changes
Abilities
Intrinsic Edge
Now also increases Void Spirit's attack damage per point of attribute by 15%
Increase is multiplicative, so it's increased from 0.45 to 0.5175
The result of these changes:
Damage at level 1 is unchanged at 52–56
Damage gain per level increased from 3.6 to 4.1
Damage at level 30 increased from 174–178 to 192–196
Secondary bonuses increased from 25% to 30%
No longer provides increased Armor or Magic Resistance
Now provides increased Attack Speed per point of Agility
Aether Remnant
Aghanim's Shard True Sight no longer reveals wards
Resonant Pulse
Barrier Amount per hero hit increased from 35/50/65/80 to 50/70/90/110
Warlock
Abilities
Eldritch Summoning
No longer levels with Chaotic Offering
Minor Imp Health rescaled from 50/130/210/290 to 5 + 15 per level
Minor Imp Explosion Damage rescaled from 25/70/115/160 to 20 + 20 per 3 hero levels
Minor Imp movement speed rescaled from 300/315/330/345 to 297 + 3 per level
Minor Imp attack damage rescaled from 10-11/14-15/18-19/22-23/26-27 to 20-21
Aghanim's Shard now increases health of minor imps by 80 and explosion damage by 45
Same values as before, but explicitly stated now
Weaver
Removed Rewoven innate ability
Abilities
Threads of Fate
New innate ability. Passive
After dealing damage to an enemy hero with an attack or ability, if Weaver remains within 700 range of them for 1.5s, he establishes a Thread of Fate that briefly slows movement of the enemy and ties them to Weaver. Each established thread of fate grants 10% bonus damage to Weaver. Threads last up to 6s and break if the distance is longer than 900. If the enemy dies with Thread of Fate established, the thread's bonuses linger for an additional 5s
Effects linger even if the enemy dies when the thread is about to be established
Movement slow is 100% for 0.2s
Talents
Level 10 Talent +60 Shukuchi Damage replaced with +50 Shukuchi Movement Speed
Level 15 Talent +20 Mana Break replaced with +90 Shukuchi Damage
Level 20 Talent Bonus Damage on Geminate decreased from +70 to +60
Windranger
Base Movement Speed decreased from 290 to 285
Removed Easy Breezy innate ability
Abilities
Tailwind
New innate ability
Using an ability conjures a stacking Tailwind that gives Windranger a brief burst of movement speed. Movement speed bonus starts gradually fading halfway through Tailwind's duration. Movement Speed Bonus per stack: 35%. Duration: 2s
Passively increases Windranger's max movement speed to 600
Upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Attacks also grant Tailwind effect. Increases Tailwind duration to 3s and makes it undispellable
Windrun
Movement Speed Bonus decreased from 60% to 50%
Cooldown decreased from 15/14/13/12s to 14/13/12/11s
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Scepter
Talents
Level 10 Talent +4 All Attributes replaced with +0.75s Windrun Duration
Level 15 Talent -2s Windrun Cooldown replaced with +40 Tailwind Max Movespeed
Level 25 Talent Windrun Cannot be Dispelled replaced with Powershot Executes Enemy Heroes Under 15% Max HP (Execute Threshold ranges from 10-15% Max HP Based on channel time and reduces with each unit the arrow comes through)
Winter Wyvern
Removed Eldwurm Scholar innate ability
Abilities
Eldwurm's Edda
New innate ability
Winter Wyvern starts the game with Eldwurm's Edda item. After 10 minutes it can be consumed, increasing the current and maximum level of a basic ability by one. Also increases Winter Wyvern's Intelligence by 25% of its base value at the time of consumption
Level 5 values are automatically calculated by applying 50% of the difference in all values between levels 3 and 4, except for the mana cost. Mana cost is kept the same as level 4
Arctic Burn
No longer has a one debuff per cast restriction on enemy heroes
Burn Duration decreased from 5s to 3s
Movement Slow decreased from 16/24/32/40% to 15/20/25/30%
Cold Embrace
Aghanim's Shard reworked
Decreases cooldown by 4s. Allied units gain 60% bonus attack damage for 6s when emerging from the icy cocoon
Winter's Curse
Attack Speed rescaled from 65 to 50/65/80
Maximum Duration rescaled from 4/5.5/7s to 6s
Bonus Duration per hero decreased from 2s to 1.5s
Bonus duration per hero can now be applied after the cast if an enemy hero becomes affected
Still can't be longer than the maximum duration
Talents
Level 15 Talent Splinter Blast Shatter Radius decreased from +250 to +175
Level 20 Talent Arctic Burn Slow decreased from +17% to +15%
Witch Doctor
Abilities
Death Ward
Attack Range increased from 600 to 600/625/650
Talents
Level 15 Talent +2 Paralyzing Cask bounces replaced with -3s Paralyzing Cask Cooldown
Level 20 Talent +75 Death Ward Attack Range replaced with Maledict bursts deal 75% damage in a 800 AoE (each burst sends projectiles that deal 75% of its damage at all enemy units within 800 range)
Level 25 Talent -6s Paralyzing Cask Cooldown replaced with +6 Paralyzing Cask Bounces
Wraith King
Base Armor decreased by 1
Abilities
Vampiric Spirit
No longer levels with Reincarnation
Lifesteal changed from 10/20/30/40% to 14% + 1% per level
Wraith Duration changed from 3.5/4/4.5/5s to 4.25s + 0.25s per 6 levels
Up to 5.5s at level 30. Also increased by 1s with Aghanim's Scepter
Bonus Attack Speed rescaled from 30/45/60/75 to 55
Bonus Move Speed rescaled from 10/15/20/25% to 20%
Bone Guard
Now always a basic ability for Wraith King
Skeleton movespeed increased from 340 to 350
Mortal Strike
Aghanim's Shard reworked
Critical strikes curse their target, dealing 75% of the damage dealt again after a 3 second delay. Vampiric Spirit's lifesteal applies to the curse damage
Reincarnation
Mana Cost decreased from 225 to 220/110/0
Now spawns 2/3/4 per enemy hero within slow radius
No longer upgraded with Aghanim's Shard
Zeus
Base Strength increased from 19 to 21
Base Damage increased by 1–3
Damage spread increased from 8 to 10
Damage at level 1 increased from 52–60 to 53–63
Base Movement Speed decreased from 315 to 305
Base Armor decreased by 1
Abilities
Static Field
No longer levels with Thundergod's Wrath
Damage changed from 2.5/3/3.5/4% to 3.45% + 0.05% per level
Arc Lightning
Mana Cost rescaled from 75/85/95/105 to 85/90/95/100
Base Damage increased from 90/120/150/180 to 105/130/155/180
Lightning Bolt
Vision and True Sight radius increased from 500 to 600
Thundergod's Wrath
Now applies the True Sight before the damage and strikes even untargetable and still invisible enemies
It used to simply reveal invisible heroes without dealing damage to them. Now it will work similarly to Lightning Bolt, dealing damage even to units affected by Smoke of Deceit, Dark Willow's Shadow Realm, Phantom Assassin's Blur, Slark's Shadow Dance or Depth Shroud, etc.
Vision and True Sight radius increased from 500 to 600
Nimbus
Damage source changed from Nimbus to the caster
Talents
Level 15 Talent -0.4s Arc Lightning Cooldown replaced with -20% Arc Lightning Mana Cost/Cooldown
Level 25 Talent +2% Static Field Damage replaced with 3 Heavenly Jump Charges
Изменения предметов
Ноут Нарека
Пассивное: Ultralag. Запуск любой дополнительной программы на ноутбуке повышает вероятность его фриза на 7%. Нельзя развеять. Срабатывает с дополнительной вероятностью в 10% если на ноуте открыт важный несохранённый проект.
Стул Начальника
Новый предмет
Пассивное: Начальник. При сидении на стуле начальника повышается шанс охуеть для нейтральных крипов, вражеских и дружеских героев, Рошана, рун, золота, предметов в инвентаре, нижнего терзателя и всех Древних. Развеивается если встать со стула начальника.
Изменения ландшафта
На карту России добавлена Малая Токмачка
Средняя температура во Франции повышена на 4 градуса
Исправлен баг со сменой точки респауна на Мадрид
Доступна новая пекарня в городе Сант Этьен
